meta.title: PsychSim neural-substrate SEED dataset
meta.purpose: Fix the schema for the redone comprehensive assembly and populate the honesty-critical core (innate wiring, inputs, endowment, plasticity rules, gaps).
principles: ASSEMBLE comprehensively from every reputable source; do not cherry-pick; catalogue gaps.
Structure exists in full; ACTIVATION is a gated, progressive subset (two switches: developmental_online = biology, calibration_active = tuning).
Default weights are the NEWBORN's initial conditions, modified by experience; adult patterns are EMERGENT validation targets, not inputs.

Plasticity rules are LOCAL and MEANING-BLIND: they see pre/post activity, current weight, an activity-derived modulator, and an age coefficient — never that a circuit is 'fear' or a state is 'threat'.
Innate structure is admitted ONLY as the primary-reinforcer wiring, as cited birth-present anatomy, never as an encoded verdict.
Panksepp's systems and any documented co-activation pattern are READ-OUTS / validation targets, never primitives the substrate is built from.
meta.honesty_wall: A rule may update a weight using local activity-derived quantities only. 'Co-active connections strengthen' is allowed (mechanism). 'Threat strengthens avoidance' is forbidden (outcome). The primary-reinforcer links are the single unavoidable seed of innate value and are logged as anatomy with citations.
meta.scaffold_note: Every invented dynamic (time constants, eligibility/plasticity/homeostatic timescales, structural-plasticity thresholds) is marked status:scaffold or noted SCAFFOLD, to be replaced by measured values.

assembly_status.grain: nucleus level (amygdala subnuclei kept separate: LA/BA/CeA/ITC)
assembly_status.how_value_enters: ONLY via the 3 cited innate links: IN-SOMATO:nociception->LA/CeA (PR-NOCICEPTION), SC-Pv->CeA/PAG (PB-LOOMING), StN->CeA (PB-STARTLE). Every other weight is either hardwired-backbone anatomy or a near-zero associative site grown by experience.
assembly_status.newborn_weights: qualitative (low / low-moderate / moderate / moderate-strong) because the literature gives ADULT patterns, not birth strengths; only the innate links are confidently non-zero at birth.
assembly_status.emergent_signature_expected: at birth the system can DETECT+EXPRESS threat (innate cues + CeA->PAG/HYPdm backbone) but cannot REGULATE it (vmPFC extinction, HPCv context online only from ~3y / ~14y). With early associative sites most plastic and NA-gated, early aversive experience should write strongly and resist extinction until regulation matures -- 'sticky early fear, late control' as a consequence of timing, not an authored rule.
assembly_status.schema_change: added optional 'function' field to circuit records (+ schemas.circuit); ALL prior fields and keys preserved.
assembly_status.next_system: episodic memory (hippocampal, beyond its contextual role) or motor output (closing the basal-ganglia/cerebellar loops); then the two-agent relationship matrix

reward_approach_notes.how_value_enters: ONLY via 6 cited appetitive links: IN-GUST:sweet->NAc-shell/VTA (PR-SWEET), IN-GUST:umami->NAc-shell (PR-UMAMI), IN-SOMATO:affective_touch->NAc-shell (PR-CONTACT), IN-INTERO:thermal_warmth->NAc-shell (PR-THERMAL), IN-INTERO:nutritive_state->LH (PR-HOMEOSTATIC).
reward_approach_notes.gate_mirrors_threat: VTA-dopamine gates approach plasticity exactly as LC-noradrenaline gates threat plasticity (same three-factor rule R5); no new machinery.
reward_approach_notes.negative_arm_is_structural: LHb->RMTg->VTA suppresses dopamine on worse-than-expected outcomes, so disappointment/reward-omission is produced by the wiring, not by a 'disappointment rule'.
reward_approach_notes.shared_substrate: reuses threat-system circuits: BA and HPCv supply appetitive cue-value and contextual-reward inputs to accumbens; mesocortical DA reaches the same vmPFC node used for extinction. Amygdala/hippocampus/vmPFC are bivalent, not duplicated.
reward_approach_notes.emergent_signature_expected: dopamine schedule peaks in adolescence while OFC/vmPFC valuation matures late -> strong reward learning with weak top-down valuation in adolescence (heightened reward/sensation-seeking): the reward-side counterpart of threat's 'sticky early fear, late control'. With approach and avoid now coexisting, approach/avoid conflict becomes an emergent balance.

sensory_input_notes.mostly_value_neutral: Sensory circuits are processing hierarchies carrying NO innate value; the schema handles pure relays cleanly. Value enters ONLY at cited links.
sensory_input_notes.innate_links_placed_here: PB-FACE and PB-BIOMOTION (subcortical orienting biases; FFA specialisation is experience-built, NOT innate), PB-VOICE (partly prenatal-learned), the sensory limb of PB-STARTLE (COCH->StN), and the aversive taste reinforcers PR-BITTER/PR-SOUR->CeA (completing the taste set; sweet/umami->reward were placed with reward).
sensory_input_notes.discriminative_vs_affective_pain: nociception->VPL->S1 is DISCRIMINATIVE (where/how much) and carries NO value; the AFFECTIVE value link nociception->amygdala lives in the threat system. Keeping these separate is the honesty discipline in a sensory case.
sensory_input_notes.resolves_placeholders: the generic sensory_thalamus/sensory_cortex sources used in threat/reward are now resolved into concrete modality-specific pathways (e.g. V-ventral->LA, A1-belt->LA, V-ventral->OFC); the earlier generic connections are left in place, not rewritten.
sensory_input_notes.developmental_note: experience-expectant critical periods (vision/ocular-dominance to ~7-8y; native-phoneme tuning in the first year) mean the hierarchies are shaped by early input -- deprivation yields lasting deficits. The innate subcortical detectors (looming/face/biomotion/voice) bias what the developing cortex learns from, so cortical specialisation (e.g. FFA) EMERGES from the innate orienting bias plus experience -- not authored.

executive_notes.zero_innate_value: The executive suite adds NO innate-reinforcer links -- correct and honest: it is the least innate, most experience-dependent, LATEST-maturing system (frontopolar cortex online ~12y, maturing into the 20s-30s).
executive_notes.its_job_is_regulation: Its connections are (a) WM maintenance/gating (dlPFC<->MDthal, dlPFC->Caud-assoc, fronto-parietal dlPFC<->S2-PPC), (b) inhibition/stopping (vlPFC/preSMA->STN), (c) TOP-DOWN REGULATION of the affective systems already built: dlPFC->vmPFC and vlPFC->LA down-regulate threat; dlPFC->NAc-core and OFC->dlPFC control approach/impulse; (d) top-down attention (FEF->SC-Pv/V-dorsal).
executive_notes.neuromodulatory_tuning: the ascending modulators now reach cortex: VTA-DA (D1 inverted-U), LC-NA (alpha2A; stress impairs), BF-ACh (attentional gain) tune dlPFC -- and BF-ACh also tunes sensory cortex, so the same modulators gate learning across systems.
executive_notes.capstone_signature_expected: with affective/sensory systems online and plastic EARLY but executive control online-but-weak early and maturing LAST, top-down regulation of threat (reappraisal/extinction) and reward (impulse control/stopping) is STRUCTURALLY weak in childhood/adolescence and strengthens into adulthood. This makes the earlier signatures coherent -- 'sticky early fear' and 'adolescent reward-seeking' are consequences of this maturational asymmetry, now fully represented. Whether self-regulation actually emerges (and how chaotically early on) is for the running model; it is NOT authored.
executive_notes.cross_system_integration: the executive suite binds the systems -- it uses the sensory parietal node (S2-PPC) for WM, takes value from OFC and context from HPCv, regulates amygdala and accumbens, and is tuned by the same VTA/LC/BF modulators that gate affective and sensory learning. The four systems now compose rather than sit side by side.

affiliation_social_notes.honesty_posture: STRONGEST caveat of any system so far: oxytocin/affiliation is well-evidenced in animals (vole pair-bonding) but WEAK and inconsistent in humans (intranasal-OT effects largely fail to replicate). Every affiliation circuit/connection is confidence=Em, evidence_base=animal_dominant, with the caveat in-line. Treat conclusions leaning on this system with the most caution.
affiliation_social_notes.distributed_not_siloed: Affiliation is a modulatory/distributed layer, not a box: it adds 6 nuclei (PVN-OT, MPOA, MeA, SEPT, PAG-PANIC, VMH) but works mostly through NEW CONNECTIONS onto existing nodes -- OT broadcasts to NAc (social reward), CeA (threat-damping), BNST, septum, MPOA; CARE drives VTA; separation-distress runs through a distinct PAG column; social recognition reuses olfactory (PIR) and visual (V-ventral) inputs.
affiliation_social_notes.oxytocin_is_a_5th_modulator: OT now appears as a gating_neuromodulator alongside DA/NA/ACh -- gating plasticity for SOCIAL stimuli (three-factor rule R5). Like the others it is a circuit output (PVN-OT), not a value we set.
affiliation_social_notes.one_innate_seed_only: Only ONE innate link is added -- contact-loss -> separation-distress (the infant cry is unlearned/cross-species). The POSITIVE side (contact is rewarding) was already placed via PR-CONTACT->NAc-shell in the reward system. CARE and bonding are otherwise hormone-gated and experience-built, not birth-value.
affiliation_social_notes.prerequisite_for_relationship_matrix: This is the substrate the future two-agent relationship matrix (trust/affection/love-hate) will grow from: bonding (OT/NAc), care (MPOA/VTA), separation-distress (PAG-PANIC), and social recognition (MeA) are the per-agent machinery whose dyadic history will accrue into named relationship states -- as EMERGENT read-outs, never allocated.
affiliation_social_notes.under_specified: PLAY (Panksepp) is only gestured at (PAG/thalamus + opioid/endocannabinoid modulation) and is flagged in the catalogue as mostly-animal/hypothesised in humans; a dedicated PLAY circuit is deferred. Human social-chemosignalling (vomeronasal) is vestigial and treated via main olfaction.

interoception_autonomic_notes.closes_the_body_brain_loop: This system is the felt-body substrate. Ascending limb: IN-INTERO/spinothalamic -> NTS -> parabrachial -> interoceptive thalamus (VMpo) -> posterior insula (primary) -> mid -> anterior insula ('material me', subjective feeling, emotional awareness). Descending limb: central autonomic network (amygdala/hypothalamus/mPFC/ACC) -> RVLM (sympathetic) and nucleus ambiguus/DMV (parasympathetic) -> body; the anterior insula translates interoceptive states into autonomic responses, closing the corticofugal loop.
interoception_autonomic_notes.where_emotion_is_felt: aIns -> dACC/CeA/OFC is the point at which bodily state becomes felt affect (Craig: limbic-sensory insula -> limbic-motor cingulate). This is the loop the whole model turned on, and the substrate the future relationship matrix will draw on (dyadic interoceptive/autonomic responses).
interoception_autonomic_notes.honesty: Ascending afferent + autonomic efferent anatomy and the insular hierarchy are E (human+animal). The DESCENDING predictive/allostatic framing (anterior insula issues interoceptive predictions) is Em (theoretically influential -- Barrett/Seth -- but direct causal human evidence limited). POLYVAGAL theory is NOT used (core premises widely regarded as refuted); standard two-branch autonomic organisation is used.
interoception_autonomic_notes.one_innate_alarm: One innate link: CO2/acidosis -> amygdala (ASIC1a chemosensation) -> unconditioned fear/panic + sympathetic. This is a documented INTERIOR threat cue -- the interoceptive counterpart of exterior cues like looming -- and it references the catalogue's air-hunger term (PR-HOMEOSTATIC). The positive homeostatic values (satiety, warmth) were placed earlier via PR-HOMEOSTATIC/PR-THERMAL.
interoception_autonomic_notes.loop_closure: Efferent output changes organ state, which re-enters via IN-INTERO -> NTS, so the interoceptive-autonomic loop is closed structurally. The HPA arm closes via cortisol -> glucocorticoid feedback to hippocampus/PFC/PVN.
interoception_autonomic_notes.gaps: Medullary/RTN respiratory chemoreceptors, the enteric nervous system, baroreflex interneurons (CVLM), and organ-level state are compressed or deferred; glucocorticoid effects on the amygdala are complex (not simply inhibitory) and are left qualitative.

meta.v8_addition_note: v8 adds the cognitive/mentalizing (theory-of-mind) social-cognition network -- rSMG-TPJ, pSTS, PCun-PCC, ATL-TP and their connections (see MASTER Part 3 S1). This completes the COGNITIVE-empathy side (the affective side -- aIns/dACC/OFC/amygdala -- was already present), so the CU/psychopathy lesion-throttle sweep can DISSOCIATE cognitive from affective empathy. Grounded in human meta-analyses; all dynamics (weights/tau/setpoint) are SCAFFOLD; new domain tag 'social_cognition'.
meta.v9_addition_note: v9 (Part 6 step 3e / Part 8 v9 pass): (a) NEW circuit VMHvl (hypothalamic attack area) + a provocation->attack pathway [IN-INTERO:provocation->VMHvl 'strong'; VMHvl->PAG 'strong'; VMHvl->HYPdm 'moderate-strong'] closing the OBS-3 connectome gap -- provocation could previously reach attack effectors only via the GABAergic CeA, which INHIBITS them, so more provocation deepened attack suppression. The CeA->PAG/HYPdm inhibition is UNTOUCHED (fear stays the baseline threat response); weights are SCAFFOLD, set by physiological ordering, not tuned to a target. (b) S1.4 social innate-wiring catalogue entries (SR-SEPARATION/PROXIMITY/REJECTION) documenting social primary perturbations the functional layer already wires (documentary; no dynamics change). Circuits 77->78, connections 176->179.
meta.v10_additions: Physical endowment + biological sex (v10). Adds ONE new input channel (IN-CONSPEC, the social-visual conspecific-valuation stream, distinct from generic IN-VIS), THREE edges on it (IN-CONSPEC:attractive_face->NAc-shell/OFC reward; IN-CONSPEC:formidability_cue->CeA defensive), and TWO physical-percept catalogue entries. Sex is a per-agent birth parameter (PH-SIZE mean; VMHvl baseline-reactivity factor -- code). Perception fires Arena-only (design ruling b). v9 connectome byte-identical (additions only). IN-CONSPEC is deliberately NOT an IN-VIS sub-channel: bare IN-VIS (novelty) prefix-matches all IN-VIS:* edges, so an IN-VIS:* physical percept would fire on generic novelty (v10 build finding). Magnitudes SCAFFOLD; outcomes (beauty premium, CU sex ratio) are scan_match targets, never weights.
meta.v14_addition_note: v14 Phase 1 (kinship/attachment, OT/VP bonding pathway) -- BEHAVIOUR-NEUTRAL foundation: the 6 unambiguous PVN-OT projections (->NAc-shell/MeA/SEPT/MPOA/BNST/PAG-PANIC) receptor-signed OTR/V1a (Gq->+1), cited; sign UNCHANGED from the transmitter fallback (+1), so no behaviour change -- this makes the existing OT/VP scaffold receptor-honest. CeA (target-cell subtlety), the 3 MPOA efferents (sign determination), and the OT->reward gating completion are FLAGGED in gaps_register for reviewer ruling, NOT forced/added (instructions 1.2/1.3). OTR/V1a already present in params.RECEPTOR_SIGN. Substrate GROWS: 0 circuits/edges removed vs v13. || Phase 1.1: ADDED the CeA-GABA (CeL) interneuron + PVN-OT->CeA-GABA (OTR,+) + CeA-GABA->CeA (GABA-A,-), resolving the PVN-OT->CeA target-cell subtlety the honest way (net OT->CeA inhibitory via the interneuron; Knobloch 2012); silence-tested. The direct PVN-OT->CeA edge stays on fallback (NOT signed). VTA afferents (MPOA->VTA, PVN-OT->VTA) + MPOA->PAG-PANIC/VMH remain FLAGGED pending the VTA target-cell research (brought to review, not signed). || Phase 1.1 (reviewer-cleared): ADDED CeA-GABA interneuron (OT->CeA net-dampening via the interneuron; tonic OT-gating of CeA accepted as grounded biology; silence-tested; golden regenerated). ADDED PVN-OT->VTA (OTR+, DIRECT on DA; completes OT->reward gating; Hung 2017). SIGNED MPOA->PAG-PANIC + MPOA->VMH GABA-A- (direct GABAergic, behaviour-neutral, cited). HELD for review: the MPOA->VTA disinhibition (VTA-GABA interneuron) -- the disinhibition does NOT net-function (the direct MPOA->VTA -1 fallback dominates; VTA's low baseline bounds the disinhibition; forcing it would destabilise DA = missing-element question). Surfaced, not forced. || Phase 1.1 FINAL DECOMPOSITION (reviewer+researcher, Option 3 -- the VTA reward-gating is a reward-ARCHITECTURE change, not a kinship edge): the attempt to build the VTA regulatory element (pacemaker baseline + VTA-GABA + PVN-OT->VTA-GABA ceiling + MPOA->VTA-GABA disinhibition/reroute) was built and full-suite-tested; it FAILED 2 tests, both from the pacemaker: (F1) the tonic interneuron's setpoint broke the uniform firing-rate-setpoint invariant (S2.5); (F2) the tonic pacemaker raised absolute DA, FLATTENING the phasic RPE the plasticity gate reads -> associative learning collapsed (paired 0.017->0.0036, below unpaired). No pacemaker value works (floor VTA = not a pacemaker; raise it = flatten learning); a feed-forward VTA-GABA ceiling at quiescent rest also could not brake PVN-OT->VTA saturation without touching resting DA/learning (they are the same signal). ROOT: the reward architecture conflates tonic and phasic DA (Grace & Bunney). RULING: DEFER the entire reward-gating unit to a dedicated reward-completion pass -- and that pass is DOWNSTREAM OF the homeostatic-self-organization (HSO) architecture, whose measured timescale hierarchy separates tonic/phasic DA by construction (resolving F2 generally, not via a bespoke RPE fix). PVN-OT->VTA is REVERTED here -- deferred, NOT deleted: a real, cited (Hung 2017) edge held out until VTA's reward architecture (under HSO) can receive it, same category as MPOA->VTA; it rejoins in the reward-completion pass. Phase 1.1 lands as its minimal honest core: CeA-GABA (+ 2 edges) and the MPOA->PAG-PANIC / MPOA->VMH signs. Nothing VTA lands in v14.

circuit.name: label
circuit.activation_bounds: [min,max] hard bounds for the leaky integrator
circuit.homeostatic_setpoint: target mean activity the circuit scales toward
circuit.developmental_online_age: age (years) the circuit comes online (BIOLOGY gate)
circuit.calibration_active_default: bool: is it in the live set by default (TUNING mask)
circuit.function: one-line functional role of the circuit

connection.default_weight: NEWBORN initial synaptic strength (from lit where it exists; else flagged assumption)
connection.gating_neuromodulator: DA|ACh|NA|5HT|none  (which modulator gates plasticity here; itself a circuit output)

innate_wiring_entry.mechanism_type: innate_connection (birth-present fixed wiring) | learning_bias (modifies plasticity params, NOT a weight)
innate_wiring_entry.caveat: the honest nuance / what it is NOT

physical_endowment.biases: what downstream effect it has (esp. how the world responds to the agent)

plasticity_rules.name: Rate-level (not spike-timing)
plasticity_rules.does: we use the rate-level BCM equivalent of STDP
plasticity_rules.constraint: MODELLING CHOICE: STDP's pre-before-post rule cannot be applied literally at this level; flagged, not hidden

plasticity_rules.name: BCM sliding threshold (workhorse)
plasticity_rules.form: dw prop a_pre*a_post*(a_post - theta); theta tracks recent avg a_post
plasticity_rules.does: gives potentiation above theta, depression below, competition, and self-stabilisation in one rule
plasticity_rules.constraint: theta is computed from the circuit's OWN activity — nothing external/meaningful

plasticity_rules.name: Homeostatic synaptic scaling
plasticity_rules.form: slow multiplicative scaling of incoming weights toward a set-point
plasticity_rules.constraint: must act fast enough not to be outrun by Hebbian growth (the 'temporal paradox') — a TIMESCALE constraint, not an outcome one

plasticity_rules.name: Three-factor neuromodulatory gating (DANGER POINT)
plasticity_rules.does: lets reward/novelty/arousal sculpt which coincidences survive
plasticity_rules.constraint: THE modulator must be the OUTPUT of a circuit set by its wiring — NEVER a value we set because we judge an outcome good/bad. This is where outcomes are most easily smuggled back in.

plasticity_rules.name: Developmental gating
plasticity_rules.form: all updates scaled by eta(age, circuit)
plasticity_rules.does: high plasticity early, dips, adolescent resurgence, low in adulthood
plasticity_rules.constraint: age enters ONLY here, as a RATE, never as a target; abstracts PV-interneuron/perineuronal-net critical-period machinery

plasticity_rules.name: Structural plasticity
plasticity_rules.form: prune weights held ~0 too long; add connections between co-active adjacent circuits within connectome limits
plasticity_rules.does: activity-dependent wiring change; overproduction-then-pruning; the 'growth from stimulation'
plasticity_rules.constraint: additions bounded by anatomical adjacency/connectome; not arbitrary

plasticity_rules.name: Bounds & competitive normalisation
plasticity_rules.form: weights within finite bounds; incoming weights normalised
plasticity_rules.does: makes learning competitive — strengthening some costs others
plasticity_rules.constraint: finite synaptic resources; competition is a consequence, not a tuned outcome

innate_wiring_catalogue.unlearned_evidence: gustofacial acceptance response present in anencephalic newborns; cross-species and cross-cultural; elicitable with minimal feeding experience; sucrose is analgesic via oral afferents in newborns
innate_wiring_catalogue.caveat: A hedonic/consummatory response, not a 'food is good' rule; salt is NOT in this class at birth (see PR-SALT)

innate_wiring_catalogue.unlearned_evidence: grimace/gape/tongue-protrusion rejection in anencephalic newborns; cross-species
innate_wiring_catalogue.caveat: Rejection reflex, not a learned 'poison' concept

innate_wiring_catalogue.unlearned_evidence: aversive facial response in newborns (Rosenstein & Oster)
acceptance-type facial response reported in newborns
innate_wiring_catalogue.caveat: Less studied than sweet/bitter

innate_wiring_catalogue.unlearned_evidence: hedonic response to salt is equivocal at birth; reports of emergence around ~4-6 months
innate_wiring_catalogue.caveat: NOT reliably present at birth — an important exception to the 'tastes are innate' generalisation; encode as delayed/uncertain

innate_wiring_catalogue.unlearned_evidence: nociceptive withdrawal and central responses present in preterm/newborn; spinothalamic pathway functional early
innate_wiring_catalogue.caveat: The birth-present link is nociceptor->aversion/arousal circuitry; it is anatomy, NOT the rule 'pain is bad'. This is the exemplar of the honesty wall.

innate_wiring_catalogue.unlearned_evidence: thermoregulatory drive is innate physiology; neonatal thermal comfort/discomfort responses
C-tactile afferents tuned to gentle stroking; skin-to-skin contact calms newborns and reduces pain responses
innate_wiring_catalogue.caveat: The affective-touch->calming link is birth-present; the SOCIAL MEANING of contact (who is safe) develops

innate_wiring_catalogue.stimulus: interoceptive homeostatic error (hunger, satiety, thirst, air-hunger/CO2)
innate_wiring_catalogue.target: drive / aversion via arcuate + NTS + insula
innate_wiring_catalogue.unlearned_evidence: homeostatic regulation (feeding, breathing, fluid balance) is innate and functional at birth
innate_wiring_catalogue.caveat: Drives, not learned goals; the arcuate hunger/satiety machinery is birth-wired

innate_wiring_catalogue.target: subcortical defensive circuit: superior colliculus -> pulvinar -> amygdala (blink/flinch)
innate_wiring_catalogue.unlearned_evidence: unconditioned defensive response across virtually all species incl. human infants; dedicated subcortical pathway
innate_wiring_catalogue.caveat: Whether the very youngest infants' postural response is defensive vs tracking is debated; timing/accuracy refines with age and mobility

innate_wiring_catalogue.target: acoustic startle reflex: cochlear root -> caudal pontine reticular nucleus -> motor
innate_wiring_catalogue.unlearned_evidence: obligatory brainstem reflex present at birth; short latency; three-synapse arc
innate_wiring_catalogue.caveat: The raw startle is innate; fear-potentiation of startle (amygdala) is acquired later

innate_wiring_catalogue.unlearned_evidence: newborns preferentially orient to face-like/top-heavy patterns from birth
innate_wiring_catalogue.caveat: CONTESTED: the innate component may be a NON-specific bias for top-heavy, high-contrast, low-spatial-frequency, temporal-field input rather than a face-specific template; cortical face specialisation (CONLERN) is experience-driven and emerges by ~3 months

innate_wiring_catalogue.unlearned_evidence: newborns preferentially orient to biological-motion point-light displays
innate_wiring_catalogue.caveat: Specificity and strength less established than looming/startle

innate_wiring_catalogue.stimulus: human voice / infant-directed speech / mother's voice
innate_wiring_catalogue.unlearned_evidence: newborns prefer human voice and their mother's voice
innate_wiring_catalogue.caveat: IMPORTANT: mother's-voice and native-prosody preferences reflect PRENATAL auditory exposure (learned in utero), so this is partly experience, not purely innate wiring

innate_wiring_catalogue.stimulus: ancestral-threat categories (snakes, spiders, angry/threatening faces, heights)
innate_wiring_catalogue.target: amygdala threat-learning: FASTER acquisition + SLOWER extinction of aversive associations for these categories
innate_wiring_catalogue.present_at_birth: yes (as a bias, not a fear)
innate_wiring_catalogue.unlearned_evidence: aversive conditioning to snakes/spiders is acquired faster and extinguishes slower than to neutral stimuli; monkeys acquire snake (not flower) fear observationally
innate_wiring_catalogue.caveat: CRUCIAL: this is a bias in LEARNABILITY, not an innate fear. Human INFANTS are NOT afraid of snakes/spiders — they show rapid DETECTION/attention, not fear. Encode as a modifier on the plasticity learning-rate/extinction for these stimulus classes, NEVER as a birth-present fear weight. Evolutionary account is itself contested.
sources: LoBue & Rakison (detection not fear in infants)

innate_wiring_catalogue.stimulus: separation / loss of contact from an attachment figure
innate_wiring_catalogue.unlearned_evidence: separation-distress vocalisations are present at birth across mammals; the PANIC/GRIEF separation system is a birth-present primary-process affect
innate_wiring_catalogue.caveat: the separation->distress link is birth-present; WHO counts as an attachment figure develops

innate_wiring_catalogue.target: calming/appetitive security substrate (NAc-shell), via IN-SOMATO:affective_touch & IN-INTERO:thermal_warmth
innate_wiring_catalogue.unlearned_evidence: proximity/skin-to-skin contact calms newborns and reduces distress; complements PR-CONTACT (C-tactile) at the social-proximity level
innate_wiring_catalogue.caveat: proximity->security is birth-present; the identity of the secure base develops

innate_wiring_catalogue.target: separation-distress / social-pain substrate (PAG-PANIC; overlaps aIns/dACC), via IN-INTERO:contact_loss (appr.exclusion)
innate_wiring_catalogue.unlearned_evidence: social exclusion recruits the physical-pain/separation-distress substrate (dACC/anterior insula); the social-pain overlap is early-emerging
innate_wiring_catalogue.caveat: the rejection->social-pain overlap reuses the separation-distress route; a dedicated social-pain channel is a registered gap, not yet a distinct edge

innate_wiring_catalogue.unlearned_evidence: cross-cultural rater agreement + infant preference (Langlois 2000); perceivers work (keypress) to view attractive faces -- operational reward signature -- with NAcc activation (Aharon 2001); medial-OFC response (O'Doherty 2003)
innate_wiring_catalogue.caveat: SCAFFOLD magnitude (direction grounded, magnitude assumed). sex_conditioned: reward value depends on perceiver x bearer sex (Aharon) -- on the EDGE WEIGHT, not the bearer's stimulus. On the IN-CONSPEC social-visual stream (FFA->OFC/NAcc), NOT generic IN-VIS. Beauty premium is MEASURED (scan_match), never coded.
sources: O'Doherty et al. 2003 'Beauty in a smile' Neuropsychologia 41(2):147-155

innate_wiring_catalogue.stimulus: formidability cue: musculature>size of a conspecific (IN-CONSPEC:formidability_cue)
innate_wiring_catalogue.unlearned_evidence: fast/automatic visual assessment of strength & fighting ability (Sell et al. 2009 Proc R Soc B). Bearer-side recalibration of own anger/entitlement by own strength is E5 (Sell/Tooby/Cosmides 2009 PNAS).
innate_wiring_catalogue.caveat: SCAFFOLD magnitude. Perceiver-side ONLY: seeing a strong OTHER -> perceiver's DEFENSIVE/submission (CeA), NOT their attack area (VMHvl). sex_conditioned on the edge weight. Bearer's OWN strength -> own VMHvl is E5, neutral-floor-guarded.
sources: Sell et al. 2009 Proc R Soc B 276:575-584

innate_wiring_catalogue.unlearned_evidence: MeApd->VMHvl canonical aggression-circuit projection (Lin 2011; Hashikawa 2017; Nordman 2020)
innate_wiring_catalogue.caveat: v11 Allen pass. SCAFFOLD weight; existence anatomy-grounded, direction only. Emergent sign INHIBITORY (MeA GABA-leading) -> a conspecific-cue brake on the attack area; effect MEASURED, never a coded drive.

innate_wiring_catalogue.unlearned_evidence: LHA->LHb major glutamatergic aversion input (Lecca 2017 eLife 30697)
innate_wiring_catalogue.caveat: v11 Allen pass. SCAFFOLD weight, direction only. Revives LHb (previously afferent-less). Sign emergent EXCITATORY.

innate_wiring_catalogue.stimulus: pallidal reward/aversion signal via ventral pallidum
innate_wiring_catalogue.unlearned_evidence: VP->LHb (Knowland 2020; Stephenson-Jones 2016)
innate_wiring_catalogue.caveat: v11 Allen pass. SCAFFOLD weight, direction only. SIGN-FIDELITY LIMITATION: literature's LHb-projecting VP is glutamatergic/aversive; nucleus-level _sign() signs VP inhibitory (reward arm). Documented, not overridden.

innate_wiring_catalogue.unlearned_evidence: BNST->VMHvl extended-amygdala modulation (Lebow & Chen 2016; Nordman 2020)
innate_wiring_catalogue.caveat: v11 Allen pass (secondary). SCAFFOLD weight, direction only. Sign emergent EXCITATORY (BNST CRF-leading).

innate_wiring_catalogue.target: aggression circuitry (VMHvl/CeA/BA), PFC controllers (OFC/vmPFC/dACC), HPCv, NAc, PAG
innate_wiring_catalogue.innate_effect: emergent (receptor-signed: dampens attack via 5-HT1A, facilitates PFC control via 5-HT2A)
innate_wiring_catalogue.unlearned_evidence: 5-HT is the principal aggression/impulsivity regulator; low 5-HT <-> impulsive/reactive aggression (Coccaro 2021; Nelson&Trainor 2007; Miczek 2007). Opposite signs across targets (1A inhibitory on attack area, 2A excitatory on PFC) -- representable only under the v12a receptor-sign convention.
innate_wiring_catalogue.caveat: v12b (2.1b). Existence/direction + receptor-signed only; weights SCAFFOLD. The 5-HT dampening of impulsive aggression must EMERGE from the signed loop -- never coded '5HT->less aggression' -- and is a scan_match target. Median raphe deferred. PFC->raphe top-down loop BUILT and self-limiting through a DRN GAD2+ interneuron (DRN-GABA feed-forward inhibition); DRN->VTA present (5-HT1A inhibitory). Median raphe deferred.

input_channels.notes: The SOCIAL-VISUAL valuation stream -- perceiving a SPECIFIC conspecific's physical traits, DISTINCT from generic IN-VIS orienting (V1/SC). Grounded: FFA->OFC/NAcc face valuation (Aharon 2001; O'Doherty 2003). Deliberately NOT an IN-VIS sub-channel, so generic visual novelty (bare IN-VIS injection) does not spuriously drive social valuation (v10 finding).

gaps_register: ★★ FLOOR DECISION (a) -- "RAISE THE FLOOR" REFUTED BY MEASUREMENT: DO NOT RAISE IT (it overshoots), the current setting is already in/below band. Correcting my OWN earlier number too: I reported the adult:developmental ratio as 0.036-0.07, but that was the SINGLE-EXPERIENCE rate (one adult experience vs one juvenile). The literature band is about learning MAGNITUDE integrated over a protocol -- the BOUT -- and the weight update scales LINEARLY by exp_factor (engine: dw = consolidate(...) * exp_factor), so the bout-integral of exp_factor IS the S10.1 plasticity-magnitude ratio. MEASURED (deterministic, analytic): a 60-trial bout, adult (starts n~28) vs developmental (starts n~2): at the CURRENT floor 0.001 the ratio is 0.313 -- ALREADY INSIDE the <=0.5 band. RAISING the floor OVERSHOOTS: F=0.05 -> 0.645, F=0.10 -> 0.854, F=0.5 -> 1.000 (adults as plastic as juveniles), because once the floor binds the adult bout is flat at F and the ratio climbs to 1. AND window_plasticity(age) x eta(age) age-gating FURTHER reduce adult plasticity (not in this integral), so the FULL ratio is LOWER than 0.313 -- more in-band or below, never arguing for a RAISE. ★ THE GENUINE TENSION THE RULING DID NOT ANTICIPATE: a BINDING floor is what would make adult plasticity EPISODE-COUNT-INDEPENDENT (the ruling's better argument), but any binding floor OVERSHOOTS the ratio at N=64 -- you cannot have both via the floor. So the episode-count independence must come from the registered TIME-NORMALISATION fix, NOT the floor. CONCLUSION: floor UNCHANGED (0.001). It is inert AND the plasticity trajectory it sits under already produces a literature-consistent adult:developmental learning-magnitude ratio. The three near-zero results remain R8 (absolute instrument) + S10.1 (rate) as diagnosed -- the floor was never their cause, and raising it would not have moved them (the pre-registered honest prediction, now moot for a raise that is not happening). Sixth measure-before-ruling refutation of the arc; it saved grounding a knob that would have overshot.

UNNORMALISED EPISODE-COUNT -> DEVELOPMENTAL OUTCOME DEPENDS ON A HARNESS PARAMETER (registered as its own item, ruled; the audit flagged it, this measurement confirms its bite). Plasticity accrues PER EPISODE, and S10.1's 1/n therefore makes the adult plasticity level ~1/N_episodes: run 64 episodes and adult exp_factor ~0.016, run 128 and it is twice as rigid. Episode DENSITY also varies per stage (30/20/15/15 over the same 18 years), so "amount of development" is set by an unnormalised count, not by developmental TIME. Raising the floor blunts this at the ADULT end (a binding floor makes adult plasticity the grounded floor regardless of episode count), but the DEVELOPMENTAL TRAJECTORY still depends on episode counts. HONEST FIX (a future pass, NOT this one; touches every developmental claim): normalise plasticity accrual to developmental TIME rather than episode count. Registered.

★ FLOOR-GROUNDING CO-MOVEMENT TEST -- PRE-REGISTRATION (written BEFORE raising the floor or running it; ruled guard, because switching to the relative instrument AFTER a negative absolute result has a fitting smell even when legitimate -- the legitimacy is that R8 was established INDEPENDENTLY and EARLIER). INSTRUMENT: the RELATIVE/share learning quantity (paired share-growth of the reward-pathway synapses), NOT absolute anticipatory_value (R8-confounded, goes negative). PREDICTIONS, direction fixed now: (1) raising the floor to bind will INCREASE a DEVELOPED-ADULT's residual relative-learning (a well-used connection retains more plasticity), and the adult:developmental ratio will rise from ~0.036-0.07 toward the grounded <=0.5 band -- THIS is the primary predicted effect and it is near-certain (it is close to definitional once the floor binds). (2) THE THREE NEAR-ZERO RESULTS (punishment yoked-differential, cue-value share, DA paired share) -- HONEST PREDICTION, and it is NOT the flattering one: I predict they will move only MODESTLY, NOT co-move dramatically, BECAUSE the prior measurement already localised their near-zero to R8 (absolute instrument) + S10.1 (rate), NOT the floor value -- on the RELATIVE quantity the learning is ALREADY present (+0.06..0.11 share growth, R8 measurement). So a strong three-way co-movement would actually SURPRISE me and would mean the floor was a bigger lever than the localisation suggested. (3) If they do NOT co-move, that CONFIRMS the two-mechanism decomposition (R8 + S10.1) and the floor grounding stands as a CORRECTNESS fix (removes the arbitrary episode-count dependence, grounds the ratio) rather than a cause-of-near-zero fix. Either way is a result; the prediction is on record.

★★ FLOOR-GROUNDING MEASUREMENT -- the ruling's "0.001 floor is 500x too restrictive" hypothesis is REFUTED, and the picture is subtler than either branch. MEASURED: after a 64-episode childhood the exp_count on used connections is median 28 / max 63, so the adult plasticity RATE exp_factor=max(FLOOR,1/n) lands at 0.036 (median) to 0.016 (max n) -- ALL an ORDER OF MAGNITUDE ABOVE the 0.001 floor. 0 of 86 connections reach the floor. A FLOOR NEVER REACHED CANNOT BE THE CAUSE of the near-zero results -- it restricts nothing. So grounding the floor VALUE alone would change nothing. WHAT IS TRUE: (1) the adult:developmental plasticity ratio IS below the literature ~0.5 band (~0.036-0.07), a real over-rigidification, BUT it is set by S10.1's 1/n running average over the 64-episode childhood, NOT by the floor -- 1/n decays to 0.036 and lands ABOVE the floor, so the floor never engages. (2) The floor IS still the correct grounding LEVER, but it is set ~14x too LOW to BIND: to ground the adult:developmental ratio to ~0.5 the floor must be RAISED to ~0.5x(developmental reference) so it CAPS the 1/n rigidification at the grounded level. (3) SEPARATELY, the near-zero AND NEGATIVE ABSOLUTE learning results (punishment ~0.002, cue-alone ~0, DA paired +0.0036, and the adult paired gain went NEGATIVE -0.004/-0.054 in the ratio probe) are the R8 ABSOLUTE-VS-RELATIVE confound (already ruled: memory in the share, absolute bounded), NOT plasticity magnitude -- which is why the ratio on anticipatory_value is uninterpretable (negative). SO THE RULING'S "three near-zero results, one cause (floor)" IS REFUTED: the three are R8 (absolute instrument) + S10.1 (rigidification rate), both ruled mechanisms; the floor is inert. FOR RULING (not taken unilaterally -- a specific grounded value + interactions): (a) raise EXP_PLASTICITY_FLOOR to a grounded ~0.5x-developmental level so it binds and grounds the adult:developmental ratio -- OR decide the ratio is set by S10.1+episode-count and address there; (b) re-measure the three results on the RELATIVE/share quantity (not absolute anticipatory_value) after -- the co-movement test the ruling wanted, on the correct instrument. Measure-before-ruling: the coherent floor hypothesis was refuted by the measurement it asked for (the f-th such this project).

★★★ FIRST END-TO-END PROTOTYPE STUDY -- RUN, ON THE GATE-6-CLEAN CORRECTED INSTRUMENT. The prototype is the instrument the six thesis studies run on: a cohort develops through the coupled life-course loop under manipulated MORAL (warm/harsh) x RELATIONAL (env-only/relational) environments, reported on the GRADED profile + margin (never the bare label). 20 conditions (5 temperaments x 2 envs x 2 relational), each a full lifecourse, all produced graded output. RESULT -- the graded profiles DIFFERENTIATE temperament meaningfully: sophropathic (high CONTROL) -> EXECUTIVE dominant (0.293) and the ONLY confident label (margin ~0.085); psychopathic -> uniquely LOW affiliation (0.083, ~half the others) with elevated reward_approach (0.234, 2nd) -- the reward-driven low-affiliative profile, VISIBLE ON THE GRADED PROFILE (reported as a fact; NOT claimed as Buckholtz-confirmed -- that needs the parked pre-registered dynamics measurement); typical (balanced) -> defensive_threat; shared_root/fearless (THREAT 0.3 / SEEKING 0.78 -- IDENTICAL gains by definition, the fearless proto-psychopath IS the shared root) -> social_cognition. ★ THE GRADED VIEW VALIDATES ITS OWN NECESSITY: 16 of 20 labels are KNIFE-EDGE (margin < _BLEND_MARGIN 0.05, most ~0.002-0.03); only sophropathic classifies confidently. The bare argmax would have presented every near-tie as a confident category -- exactly the failure the graded-profile wiring (item 1) fixes. Environmental/relational effects are SMALL (~0.001-0.005 per domain, S18-consistent); the relational arm shows slightly higher affiliation than env-only (the F2 effect, small but present and directionally correct). CAVEATS carried honestly: (a) the ungrounded plasticity floor (0.001 vs the literature ~0.5 ratio) means absolute learning-rate magnitudes read near-zero -- profiles and their DIFFERENTIALS are trustworthy, absolute learning numbers are not, until the floor is grounded (first after-prototype item); (b) report the graded profile + margin, never the bare label as a finding. THE PROTOTYPE GOAL IS MET: an end-to-end study run producing honestly-measured graded developmental outcomes a reviewer can trust, with NO banned patterns in the study layer.

PROTOTYPE item 3a -- the two STRUCTURAL-ZERO experiments fixed (both produced precise-looking output that meant nothing). JUSTICE: shares() counted against the RETIRED verdict vocabulary (sophropathic/intermediate/psychopathic) -- impossible keys, since classify() returns _READOUT_DOMAINS -- so every share read 0.0%. Now counts against the real emergent domains. This exposed a FIFTH vacuous guard (audit shape): test_default_parameters_do_not_manufacture asserted on.shares()["psychopathic"]==0.0, trivially true on an impossible key; RESTATED to its real intent on the real vocabulary (default inert justice leaves the outcome DISTRIBUTION unchanged -- max domain-share shift < 0.20). NOTE: the justice CRIMINOGENIC-EFFECT claim itself (3 tests already @skip for "deleted verdict") still rests on the retired sophropathic<->psychopathic vocabulary and needs a DOMAIN-vocabulary construct decision to revive -- registered, a study-design call, not a prototype blocker. BIFURCATION: bisect_edge bisected the bare argmax LABEL to tol=1e-3 even when the profile top-two gap was ~1.6e-4 -- a precise boundary over noise. Now guarded by the CONTINUOUS score (profile_axis, already carried on RunResult): the result reports score_below/above/gap and a `confident` flag (score_gap > 0.02 SCAFFOLD floor); a label flip whose underlying score barely moves is a knife-edge crossing, not a bifurcation. Both fixes apply the standing discretization principle to the study experiments. test_justice + test_bifurcation green (17 tests, 3 pre-existing skips).

★ INTERGENERATIONAL-TRANSMISSION CLAIM WITHDRAWN (prototype item 2b; ruled -- ground it or withdraw). parent_to_environment carried THREE banned patterns: (1) three invented coefficients (1.3/0.4/0.6) mapping disposition straight to warmth/structure/recognition; (2) the parent is NEVER an agent -- disposition->environment is a formula with no development, no behaviour; (3) PARENT_SEEDS feeds psychopathic_seed/sophropathic_seed -- documented DEVELOPED END-STATES (outcome categories) -- as CAUSAL INPUTS, the outcome-category-as-primitive violation. So the Stage-6/7 transmission claim ("dispositional parents transmit outcome via the environment they create; same disposition -> opposite outcome") is NOT a grounded emergent result. WITHDRAWN and recorded: the stages still RUN as a scaffold demo, clearly marked in code + stage notes; NO thesis claim rests on them. GROUNDING PATH (registered, a future pass, explicitly NOT a prototype blocker): PARENT-AS-AGENT -- instantiate the parent, let it DEVELOP from its own temperament + rearing, and let the child's Environment EMERGE from the parent's emergent caregiving BEHAVIOUR, not a coefficient (wire what the agent perceives; behaviour emerges). That also dissolves violation (3): a grounded parent is a TEMPERAMENT that develops, never an outcome category injected as input. This clears the second of the two study-layer banned patterns (punishment_sensitivity was the first, dc0070f).

★ TWO TIER-1 AUDIT INSTRUMENT DEFECTS FIXED (ruled). (A) CU/empathy: callous_unemotional is now written as the EXPLICIT complement clamp(1.0 - empathy) -- CU + empathy = 1.00000 exactly, so the code shows they are ONE variable and no figure can present them as two independent constructs. empathy is the primary; CU its labelled complement. (B) punishment_sensitivity: the BANNED hardcode clamp(0.3 + 0.7*fear) -- a direct trait->outcome mapping that stood as the headline learning result -- is REPLACED by the real study.punishment_learning yoked probe (CS-specific learned aversion, paired minus unpaired, confound-cancelled; a DIFFERENTIAL, so robust to R8 common-mode normalisation), run on a deep copy so the frozen engine is never conditioned. ★ THE FIX SURFACES A FINDING, exactly the audit pattern: the hardcode was manufacturing a 0.3-1.0 value the substrate does not produce -- the REAL yoked learned aversion for a typical developed agent is ~0.0018 (passive-avoidance deficit ~0.998). Absolute associative punishment learning is NEAR-ZERO on the developed substrate (a developed agent has undergone R8 normalisation over development, further eroding the absolute value below the newborn 0.026-0.054). The DIFFERENTIAL discrimination is real (~2x across reactivity in the newborn) but the ABSOLUTE magnitude is tiny -- the same absolute-vs-relative story as the DA cue-value read-out. OPEN, registered for the reward/value characterisation (NOT tuned here): whether the [0,1] punishment_sensitivity construct wants a grounded REFERENCE SCALE so the real differential discrimination is visible rather than saturated near deficit=1. The raw differential is wired now (honest, un-tuned); the scale is a characterisation question, coupled to the adult-plasticity-floor grounding. Tests green (ordinal/structural, magnitude not pinned). A full gate is owed.

HARSH MIRROR LINK-5 RE-MEASURED ON THE CORRECTED INSTRUMENT -- MAGNITUDE STANDS, and the invariance is itself informative. The ruling flagged that affiliation -0.0128 was measured before the read-out re-derivation. Re-measured on the fully-corrected tree: IDENTICAL to 4 dp (affiliation 0.1563->0.1434 = -0.0128; defensive_threat 0.1941->0.1968 = +0.0026). WHY INVARIANT: (a) the read-out re-derivation changed the OBSERVER _OBS_*/DEFENSIVE_OUTPUT sets, NOT _domain_activity -- and the harsh-mirror link-5 profile is _domain_activity over _READOUT_DOMAINS, a different path; (b) the Lump #13 domain-count shift (+~0.01 defensive_threat) is COMMON-MODE -- it lifts BOTH the warm and harsh arms equally, so it CANCELS in the harsh-minus-warm DIFFERENCE, which is the actual even-handedness claim. So the magnitude is invariant BECAUSE it is a differential measured the same way in both arms -- a stronger position than a magnitude that shifted. The even-handedness claim (the substrate produces both developmental directions from the same machinery; harsh -> less affiliation -0.0128, mirroring F4 warm +0.0088) now STANDS on the corrected instrument.

★ BUCKHOLTZ DEAD AS CLAIMED; the DYNAMICS-level question OPEN but NOT to be pursued now (ruled -- contamination flag). The psychopathic->reward_approach CLASSIFIED FLIP is dead without qualification (observer-construct argmax artifact, ~0.005 margin). A SEPARATE legitimate question -- does the substrate show mesolimbic reward HYPERSENSITIVITY under a psychopathic temperament, measured on DYNAMICS as the other three were -- was NEVER ASKED and is NOT a rescue of the dead finding. But pursuing it NOW would be motivated by wanting to restore a lost finding, which is exactly what pre-registration prevents. RULING: registered as open; do NOT prioritise. If ever pursued it MUST be pre-registered with a GENUINE prior (including the live possibility the answer is no) and reported whatever it says. Any version that reads as "we found another way to show Buckholtz" is the fitting move wearing a new path.

AUDIT-CLOSED FRAMING (for the thesis record, ruled): the DIFFERENTIAL survival IS the result, and is stronger than a clean sweep. Three findings measured on substrate DYNAMICS survived instrument correction; the one measured through the observer ARGMAX did not. An inventory where all four survived would tell us nothing about whether the instrument mattered -- the fourth failing is the CONTROL that makes the three credible, and the failure was predicted IN ADVANCE by a named mechanism (knife-edge argmax, flagged 3x prior, registered as a principle) and confirmed. Refusing the graded-read-out rescue is the load-bearing part. THE SESSION'S METHODOLOGICAL RESULT: every apparent substrate failure this arc decomposed into grounded mechanisms working as designed (80x DA collapse = S10.1 + R8 + S18 deflation, not one grain a bug; divergence sentinel ground to noise BY grounding; six brittle instruments; the one dead finding measured through the argmax) -- the substrate is more disciplined than the instruments that read it, confirmed at the mechanism, read-out, and findings levels.

(3) ADOLESCENT reward-seeking/risk -- SURVIVES (DYNAMICS). risk_index: child(6)=0.162, adolescent_min=0.199, adult(30)=0.164 -- a robust +0.038/+0.036 elevation across the WHOLE adolescent window (not a fragile argmax peak). ★★ EMERGENT-FINDINGS RE-VERIFICATION -- PRE-REGISTRATION (written BEFORE measuring, per ruling: a prediction recorded after the fact cannot be distinguished from a rationalisation). Measurement path fixed by what each finding CLAIMS; the result then STANDS -- no hunting for a read-out that rescues a failing finding. Report corrected MAGNITUDES, not survive/fail verdicts. PATH: DYNAMICS (the P1 loop -- displayed_affect vs the separate perceive_affect roll, test_p1_loop). PREDICT: SURVIVES (dynamics-measured, independent of the observer/argmax). (2) TREMBLAY aggression trajectory -- CLAIM: physical aggression peaks ~age 2-3 then declines with maturing inhibitory control. PATH: DYNAMICS (aggression pathway: young->aggress, adult->restrain; test_aggression_pathway). PREDICT: SURVIVES (dynamics-measured). (3) ADOLESCENT reward-seeking / risk -- CLAIM: dual-systems imbalance -> risk peaks in adolescence (reward matures before control). (4) ★ BUCKHOLTZ reward-hypersensitivity -- CLAIM AS DOCUMENTED: the VTA reward-DA adolescent bump flips the psychopathic study label to reward_approach (test_characterisation:93, test_substrate:300). If the flip fails, THAT IS THE RESULT -- it was an argmax artifact at noise-scale margin; I will NOT then go measure a graded reward-DA elevation to rescue it (that would be the fitting move). The honest inventory records it as an observer-construct artifact if that is what it is. RESIDUAL from R8 RE-CLASSED as a HYPOTHESIS not a diagnosis (ruling): anticipatory_value cue-alone ~0 despite reward-pathway potentiation -- candidate causes are (a) the cue->reward associative link is weak OR (b) another absolute-vs-relative read-out issue (the same fourth-instance shape); BOTH live until measured.

★★ R8 vs THE REINFORCED SYNAPSE -- RULED BY MEASUREMENT: R8 IS MULTIPLICATIVE AND CORRECT; NO PATCH. The literature (Turrigiano 1998; Abbott & Nelson 2000) does not choose between "protect the synapse" and "let it compete" -- biology normalises MULTIPLICATIVELY so the learned RELATIVE structure survives (the memory lives in the ratios, not by exemption). Measured on both fronts: (1) R8 is multiplicative BY CONSTRUCTION -- normalise_incoming does scale=target/tot; [w*scale] -- every afferent scaled by the SAME factor, so relative weights are preserved by definition. (2) The learned SHARE grows with pairing and survives: paired vs unpaired (cue+reward vs cue-alone) the reward-pathway synapses gain SHARE of their target's total drive -- PVT->NAc-core +0.106, DRN->VTA +0.064, VTA->NAc-shell +0.063, DRN->NAc-shell +0.062. So R8 is NOT erasing a memory; the relative structure encodes the learning and R8 preserves it. THE DEFECT BRANCH (non-multiplicative distortion) IS REFUTED. CONSEQUENCE, as the ruling predicted -- FOURTH instance of the audit pattern: anticipatory_value reads ABSOLUTE reward-circuit activation from cue-alone, which R8 bounds (total incoming held ~constant), so it UNDER-REPORTS a relative learning that is intact. The DA-learning READ-OUT/test should measure the SHARE/relative quantity, not absolute anticipatory_value -- the fix is the instrument, not R8. AND the S18 framing (ruling S3): connectome growth is a MODELLING event, not a biological one -- the pre-growth share was inflated by a MISSING afferent set (the cue synapse held an artificially large share of a target missing most of its real inputs), so part of the ~10.5x is honest S18 DEFLATION toward the grounded value, not erosion. RESIDUAL, FLAGGED (separate from R8, not a defect in it): anticipatory_value cue-alone reads ~0 even though the reward pathway potentiated -- the CUE->reward-pathway associative link specifically may be weak, a distinct cue-association question worth a later look. R8 UNCHANGED. Tagging-and-capture (Frey & Morris) NOT needed -- multiplicative scaling already preserves the memory, so a protection mechanism would be solving a solved problem.

★★ DA SECOND FRONT -- DIAGNOSED (ruled: trace not patch). The associative-specific cue-value erosion (0.0381 -> 0.0023 across the connectome growth, the unpaired control unchanged throughout) is DOMINATED by R8 COMPETITIVE NORMALISATION, confirmed by TWO independent lines. (1) BISECTION of the paired cue-value gain: e33fb08 (78 circ) +0.0325 -> b805bbf (96 circ) +0.0115 -- the big drop (72%% of the second front) tracks the CIRCUIT GROWTH 78->96, and S56 STAGE 1 (the cortical E-I loop-gain grounding, 19fbed3) changed the paired gain by EXACTLY ZERO (b805bbf == 19fbed3 to 6 dp), REFUTING the E-I-damping hypothesis as the dominant cause; a smaller second drop 0.0115 -> -0.0013 at 5f3dd2d is the S56 OFC gate (E-I damping on the OFC->DA teaching path, consistent with the documented ungrounded OFC->VTA/OFC->NAc-core). (2) SILENCE-R8 COUNTERFACTUAL on HEAD: params.NORMALISE False recovers the paired gain 0.00227 -> 0.01570 (6.9x). MECHANISM: R8 holds each target's TOTAL incoming drive roughly constant, so as the connectome grew (78->101 circuits) and reward-pathway targets gained afferents, the DA-gated cue->reward synapse's SHARE was renormalised downward -- the learned association is competitively eroded by the growth of UNRELATED afferents onto shared targets. ★ THE DESIGN QUESTION, SURFACED NOT DECIDED (a ruling, not a patch): is this CORRECT (synaptic competition / scaling is biologically real -- a new afferent SHOULD dilute existing ones) or a DEFECT (a genuinely DA-reinforced association should be PROTECTED from competitive normalisation -- real synaptic tagging/capture shields potentiated synapses from scaling)? Both are grounded positions; the literature supports protection of tagged synapses (Frey & Morris synaptic-tagging-and-capture). This belongs with the reward/value-system characterisation and the adult-plasticity-floor grounding -- the DA-learning magnitude cannot be set until this is ruled. NO PATCH APPLIED; R8 unchanged.

★★ STANDING PRINCIPLE (RULED) -- STUDY-LAYER ASSERTIONS GO ON THE CONTINUOUS QUANTITY, NEVER ON A DISCRETIZATION OF IT. Three instances this session, one shape: F4 label divergence (bare argmax over a 0.0021 margin), the divergence sentinel (sign-stability on a noise-scale quantity), and test_history_shapes_behaviour (aggregate act Counter, one act out of 162). In every case a DISCRETIZED read-out (argmax label, sign, integer counter) of a CONTINUOUS underlying quantity was asserted at a magnitude that was always noise-scale -- the discretization throws away the graded information, so the assertion tracks noise, not the mechanism. The MECHANISM held all three times; only the discretization broke. RULE: study-layer assertions belong on the continuous quantity that CARRIES the effect (profile shift, weight divergence, tie differentiation, margin), not on a discretization of it. Where a discretized assertion is genuinely wanted it MUST carry a measured adequate margin (the F4 margin-gate pattern) so it cannot pass or fail on noise. TEST-INTEGRITY SWEEP now has TWO shapes: (1) VACUOUS GUARDS -- tests that read the property they validate, or bound an effect that has vanished (3 instances: OFC-GABA flag guard, throttleable len>20, DA-learning control) -- these PASS for the wrong reason; (2) BRITTLE DISCRETIZATIONS -- assertions on a discretized read-out of a continuous quantity (3 instances above) -- these FAIL for the wrong reason. Both are tests whose green/red does not track the thing they name. This is the audit's central finding continuing to hold: the substrate keeps holding; the instruments keep proving brittle.

HARSH-MIRROR LINK 1 -- THE GROUNDED FIX (RULED, design captured; NOT yet built). Link 1 breaks on a missing provocation SOURCE, not a missing mechanism: in _ARENA_PERCEPTION only the "aggress" act carries provocation, so aggression is perceivable only once it exists. The literature names the source that needs no prior aggression -- SOCIAL REJECTION is the most-replicated aggression elicitor (Twenge 2001; Chow 2008; Gaertner 2008; Warburton 2006; childhood peer-rejection -> later aggression), generalised by BERKOWITZ: aversive events produce aggression to the extent they produce NEGATIVE AFFECT. TWO ROUTES, both using machinery the model already has, both PRESENT-not-assign (the F2 recognition-not-valuation keystone: present the cue, the perceiver values it, the selector decides -- verify no response is written, as F2 was): ROUTE 1 -- the existing "separation"/rejection act (already occurs, currently maps only to affiliation-negative) ALSO carries provocation; this breaks the bootstrap because a harsh cohort member who rejects supplies provocation with no prior aggression. ROUTE 2 -- negative displayed_affect (already on the exchange since P1) contributes provocation (Berkowitz's general negative-affect route, of which rejection is one instance). ROUTE 3 (REGISTER, build only if 1-2 insufficient) -- environmental harshness reaching the exchange percept (a new pathway env->dyad; larger change). THEN re-run the harsh mirror per-link. ★ AND a ruled CAUTION: before characterising the measured "no self-sustain" (2/88 even when seeded) as a defect, measure SUSTAINED-provocation escalation via Route 1's REPEATED rejection -- the model's own Tremblay finding (physical aggression peaks ~age 2, declines) says a developed agent absorbing ONE provocation is behaving correctly; a single forced seed is the wrong test. Measure before characterising.

★★ THE HARSH MIRROR -- MEASURED PER-LINK (the endpoint of the whole Lump #13 descent). (a) BOOTSTRAPPING GAP: in _ARENA_PERCEPTION only the "aggress" act carries provocation (thwarting/threat); every warm/neutral act maps to affiliation/vulnerable_other/separation, and every exchange starts at "approach" -- so aggression is perceivable ONLY once it already exists, and nothing seeds the first one. ★ THE ACTIVE/FLIGHT ARM HAS NO GROUNDED SELECTOR POPULATION -- REVEALED, NOT CREATED, BY REMOVING THE REFUTED SOM+ EDGE. With CEl-SOM->CEm-active gone (refuted by Fadok 2017), the selector reaches the output stage through ONE arm -- PKC-delta+ -| CEm-freeze (Haubensak 2010) -- so the FREEZE output is selector-gated and the ACTIVE output is not gated at all. Measured across a full threat x affiliation sweep, CEm-active tracks threat (0.053 -> 0.272) and is COMPLETELY INSENSITIVE to affiliation (0.053/0.053/0.054 at threat 0; 0.272/0.273/0.274 at threat 1.0): it follows its BA drive regardless of which population wins the local competition. THE CAUSE IS A CONFLATION OF TWO LITERATURES: Haubensak 2010's axis is PKC-delta+ (CeL-off, gates CeM output) -- that is the arm the model has, correctly grounded. Fadok 2017's competing pair is CRF+ vs SOM+, and it is the CRF+ population that drives the ACTIVE/flight response. THE MODEL HAS NO CRF+ CeL POPULATION, so there is no grounded population available to gate the active arm. The removed SOM+ edge had been standing in for that missing population, which is why removing it REVEALED the gap rather than causing it. CONSEQUENCE FOR THE S56 EXIT MEASUREMENT: freezing is now a selector state; aggression is not -- the exit is HALF met. RESOLUTION CONDITION: a grounded CRF+ CeL population (Fadok 2017), mutually inhibitory with SOM+, gating the active output -- OR an explicit ruling that the active arm is tonic-by-design. Do NOT restore the refuted SOM+ projection to close it. NOTE this is the LUMPING PATTERN AGAIN, one level further in: two distinct CeL populations (PKC-delta+ and CRF+) were doing one job under one name.

★ EDGE REMOVED ON A CITATION, NOT FOR CONVENIENCE (CEl-SOM->CEm-active; RULED). This is the documented EXCEPTION to never-remove-anatomy-unilaterally: the edge is removed because the literature REFUTES it. In Fadok et al. 2017 the CeL SOM+ population suppresses the active/flight response by LOCAL inhibition WITHIN CeL -- it inhibits the competing flight-promoting population locally; it does NOT project to a CeM output population to suppress it. The edge was built as the model's INFERENCE of how within-CeL competition reaches the output stage, and was already flagged as inferred-not-cited by the fabrication audit. Its sibling CEl-PKCd->CEm-freeze STAYS -- that one is directly grounded (Haubensak 2010: PKC-delta+ CeL neurons gate CeM output). THE FUNCTION IS NOT LOST, IT IS RELOCATED TO WHERE THE BIOLOGY PUTS IT: SOM+'s grounded role is the local SOM+ -| PKC-delta+ mutual inhibition, which the selector already builds. CONSEQUENCE FOR EMERGENCE, and it is the reason this matters beyond tidiness: the removed edge was a route by which the selection could have rested on a specific projection WEIGHT rather than on the local drive balance. With it gone, the selection reaches the output ONLY through PKC-delta+ -| CEm-freeze, gated by which population wins the local competition -- so the selection is produced by the drive balance itself. Removing it makes the selection MORE emergent, not less.

MECHANISM REGISTERED, NOT BUILT (S56 -- required IF load becomes variable): the E-I loop limbs are held by EXEMPTION from the eroding rules (a held weight = a held ratio) because the model's afferent load is developmentally FIXED. A TRUE DYNAMIC E-I-RATIO HOMEOSTAT -- inhibition re-derived against the node's MEASURED excitatory drive (Vogels/Sprekeler/Gerstner inhibitory plasticity) -- is the more faithful mechanism and becomes REQUIRED if a future pass makes afferent load developmentally variable (synaptic pruning/growth changing a node's afferent count during a life, or an explicitly developing connectome). Until load changes it would buy a self-correction for something that never happens, at the cost of a new rule in the plasticity layer governing the WHOLE substrate -- the VTA lesson (a dependency existing != build it this pass). Registered as the mechanism that exemption's validity DEPENDS ON load-invariance, and that becomes necessary if that assumption breaks.

CORRECTION REGISTERED (S56): the model's R4-HOMEO is a FIRING-RATE homeostat, NOT an E-I homeostat -- homeo_factor = 1 - rate*(activity - setpoint) scales ALL of a circuit's incoming weights UNIFORMLY toward a rate set-point, blind to excitatory vs inhibitory. It therefore CANNOT preserve an E-I ratio; applying it to the recurrent E-I loops would erode the grounded balance along with everything else. The biology's E-I homeostat (inhibitory plasticity holding the E/I ratio at a set-point) is a DIFFERENT mechanism from the model's rate homeostat -- do not conflate them. R8 competitive normalisation (normalise_incoming, holding total incoming drive at max(1.0, n*0.5)) was the MAIN eroder: a grounded 1.0 limb sharing a 2-edge incoming pool was renormalised away to ~0.47.

CLAMP REVERSAL + THE LESSON (S56, refuted by measurement): I diagnosed that the grounded E-I loop weights "decay" in development and ruled to EXEMPT the 8 limbs from R4/R8/Hebbian plasticity. MEASUREMENT REFUTED IT: with the clamp ON, vmPFC and dlPFC SATURATE to 1.000 at rest with NO input and DRN rises to 0.855; with the clamp OFF and the Stage-1 grounded weights, vmPFC 0.676 / dlPFC 0.851 / DRN 0.566 -- the best of three states (pre-Stage-1 was 0.891/1.000/0.590). THE REFRAMING: the "decay" was NOT erosion of a grounding -- it was the homeostat DOING ITS JOB, adapting the E-I limbs to hold each node at its set-point in context. The grounded birth weight is the STARTING POINT; the plasticity is the MAINTENANCE. Exempting the limbs removed the very mechanism maintaining the balance. So the E-I loops are PLASTIC-AND-MAINTAINED, never clamped; grounded start + active maintenance together give the best balance. Caught by the serotonin mechanism-proof (silence DRN-GABA -> the loop runs hot), which is now a twice-proven canary -- keep it central. SHARED ERROR: the ruling cited Vogels/Gerstner (inhibitory plasticity ACTIVELY maintains E-I balance) and then ruled to freeze the inhibition -- the cited mechanism contradicted the fix. A reviewer must verify the cited mechanism supports the FIX, not merely the diagnosis received.

Three over-attributions in one session -- "dlPFC directly suppresses aggression" (false: no such projection; the path is indirect via vmPFC), "dlPFC does not saturate" (false: state-dependent; under-settled measurement), "the grounded balance is eroded by plasticity" (false: the plasticity IS the maintenance) -- each caught ONLY by measurement, never by reasoning. (1) It EXAGGERATED a fragile result -- the psychopathic->reward_approach flip on a ~0.05 margin looked like a hard categorical change. (2) It now HIDES a real one -- F4's affiliation +0.0088 is correctly directed and grounded, but cannot reorder a profile whose top margin is 0.0021 (social_cognition 0.2263 vs executive 0.2242), so the label reports NO effect where a real effect exists. The read-out already carries `runner_up` and `margin` fields (added in the D6 closeout for exactly this reason). RECOMMENDATION: the study's developmental claims should be measured on the GRADED PROFILE/margin shift, not the argmax label. Drawn when the study read-out is next addressed. This is not fitting to a wanted result -- it is measuring the grounded effect on the graded quantity that carries it rather than on a discretization that discards it.

LUMP #13 ROUTING MAP (CeA un-lumping -- diagnosis, verified against the seed; 24 edges move). CEl (LATERAL: sensory/cortical/thalamic/intra-amygdalar in, contains the SOM+/PKCdelta+ selector) takes 15 EXCITATORY afferents -- intra-amygdalar BA, LA; sensory channels IN-SOMATO:nociception, IN-GUST:bitter, IN-GUST:sour, IN-INTERO:CO2_acidosis, IN-CONSPEC:formidability_cue, IN-CONSPEC:familiar_wary; subcortical sensory relays SC-Pv (looming), StN (acoustic startle), PBN (lamina-I pain/visceral -- the canonical PBN->CeL nociceptive route); cortical aIns; neuromodulatory/humoral LC (alpha1), AdrenalCortex (cortisol); and PVN-OT -- the last EXPLICITLY grounded in the seed already ("OT->CeL excitation, Knobloch 2012"). Plus 2 INHIBITORY: DRN (5-HT1A) and ITC (which per the literature inhibits BOTH divisions, so ITC->CeA must SPLIT into ITC->CEl and ITC->CEm). CEm (MEDIAL: the output stage, driven largely from CEl rather than directly from external afferents) takes ALL SIX efferents -- vlPAG-GABA, HYPdm, BNST, PVN, RVLM, LC -- and is driven by the CEl->CEm inhibition plus ITC. INTERNAL: the existing CeA-GABA is ALREADY documented as the CeL->CeM feed-forward inhibition (Knobloch 2012), so it maps onto the CEl->CEm projection directly; the Stage-2 CeA->CeA-GABA drive limb maps onto the afferent drive recruiting the CEl inhibitory population; and the NEW element is the SOM+ -| PKCdelta+ mutual inhibition (the winner-take-all selector).

LUMP #13 SUFFICIENCY FINDING (surfaced by the routing map -- SCOPE-CRITICAL): a 2-way CEl/CEm split ALONE does NOT resolve the coupling. BOTH coupled outputs leave from CEm -- CEm->vlPAG-GABA (which DISINHIBITS the freezing column, so more CEm = more freezing) and CEm->HYPdm (which SUPPRESSES the attack column, so more CEm = less aggression). Splitting CeA into CEl+CEm therefore moves the coupling intact from CeA to CEm: one CEm activation still drives both opposite-signed outputs. Resolving the coupling REQUIRES the selection to reach the OUTPUTS -- i.e. CEm output populations must be distinguishable (the real CeM has heterogeneous output neurons projecting differentially to PAG vs hypothalamus) and the CEl SOM+/PKCdelta+ selector must gate them DIFFERENTIALLY, so freezing and aggression become different CEm output STATES rather than one activation. So the pass is not "split CeA in two" -- it is "split CeA into a selector (CEl) and DIFFERENTIABLE output populations (CEm), wired so the selector chooses among them." This is the exit measurement's actual precondition and must be scoped in.

S18 CONSERVATIVE-ERROR-DIRECTION REGISTERED (a property of the substrate, not of one result): the model's errors run in ONE direction -- INCOMPLETENESS INFLATES effect sizes and GROUNDING DEFLATES them. Confirmed three times in a single session, all against grounded corrections: the divergence sentinel 0.0585 -> 0.0401 (S56 Stage 1, beating its own predicted resolution ~0.0504); the DA-gated learning tests +0.0008 -> -0.0013 (S56 Stage 3, on an ungrounded OFC->DA over-drive); and F4's classified-label divergence ~50% of seeds -> 0/10 (the grounded cortical gate family). Earlier instances: the CU signature (a dead LC manufacturing a clean effect) and the divergence arc 0.0755 -> 0.0534 -> 0.0335. CONSEQUENCE, and it is a standing interpretive rule: EVERY EFFECT SIZE MEASURED ON AN INCOMPLETE SUBSTRATE IS AN UPPER BOUND -- provisional DOWNWARD, never upward. A result that shrinks under grounding is the expected direction and is evidence the grounding was real; a result that GROWS under grounding is the anomaly that demands explanation. Distrust the wanted result; counterfactual-test it; report effects as bounds.

LUMP #13 STAGE A -- MEASURED (built, probed, NOT gated; held for ruling). Two predictions confirmed and one assumption OVERTURNED. (1) THE SATURATION MOVED TO CEl, as predicted: CEl hits 1.000 under threat, because the CeA-GABA brake was ALWAYS the CeL->CeM feed-forward inhibition (its own basis string said so) and therefore MOVED to CEm, leaving CEl carrying 15 excitatory afferents with no local recurrent brake until the Stage C SOM+/PKC-delta+ mutual inhibition is built. So the ceiling relief is NOT delivered by the anatomical split alone -- it is Stage C's to deliver. (2) CEm IS SILENT -- 0.000 at rest, under threat, and under provocation -- because with zero external afferents it receives ONLY inhibition (CEl-GABA strong + ITC) and no excitatory drive. Disinhibition cannot rescue it: CEm's baseline is 0.05, so even fully disinhibited it cannot produce a defensive output. (3) ★ THE OVERTURNED ASSUMPTION, and it re-reads the whole coupling: the saturated CeA lump was NOT driving the defensive column -- it was FLATTENING it. CeA is GABAergic; pinned at 1.000 it inhibited all six targets to the floor. Under threat, pre-split: vlPAG-GABA 0.000, HYPdm 0.000, PVN 0.000, RVLM 0.000, BNST 0.006. With CEm silent (delivering no inhibition at all) those same targets RISE on their other afferents: 0.014 / 0.173 / 0.310 / 0.205 / 0.349. Neither state is correct -- the lump crushed its targets uniformly, Stage A releases them entirely. The correct state needs CEm to carry a GRADED inhibitory output, which REQUIRES an excitatory afferent. COLLATERAL, and it matters: CEm silence also severs CeA->LC (CRF-R1, EXCITATORY -- the D6 #2 entailment and the aversive afferent the LC pacemaker work grounded); LC under threat falls 0.564 -> 0.315.

LUMP #13 STAGE A -- SCOPE CORRECTION PROPOSED (flagged, NOT built; contradicts a ruled fact so it is the design session's call). The ruling states CEm takes ZERO external afferents. The measurement shows that leaves the output stage dead. The grounded remedy is EXACTLY PARALLEL to the ITC split the ruling already authorised: BLA projects to BOTH central-amygdala divisions, so `BA -> CEl` should become `BA -> CEl` AND `BA -> CEm` -- one edge becoming two, not an edge moving. This is well-characterised anatomy (BLA->CeM alongside the dominant BLA->CeL route) and it is what makes the real disinhibitory architecture work: CeL tonically inhibits a CeM that is being independently driven, so relieving that inhibition RELEASES a drive that is actually there. Without a CEm excitatory afferent the disinhibition motif has nothing to disinhibit, and Stage C's selector would gate a silent node. Candidates considered and ranked: BA->CEm (strongest, well documented); PBN->CEm (real but CeL/CeC-dominant); LA->CEm (weak -- LA reaches CeM largely via BA). NOT built unilaterally.

LUMP #13 -- BA->CEm LANDED, and MEASURED NECESSARY BUT NOT SUFFICIENT. The ruled scope correction is built (inherited BYTE-IDENTICAL from its twin BA->CEl: same moderate weight, same anatomy basis, same transmitter fallback, same confidence -- no knob to tune). CEm nevertheless STILL measures 0.000 in every condition. The afferent ledger under threat says why, quantitatively: CEl-GABA -0.5783 (act 0.680 x strong 0.85), ITC -0.0634, BA +0.3028 -> NET -0.3389. BA's excitation is real and is simply OUTWEIGHED, roughly 2:1, by a blanket inhibitory brake. COUNTERFACTUAL PROOF (silence-the-element, not a tune): with CEl-GABA fully attenuated, CEm produces GRADED, CONTEXT-DIFFERENTIATED output -- 0.269 under threat vs 0.117 under provocation (2.3x) -- and its inhibitory outputs then bite (HYPdm 0.173->0.028, PVN 0.310->0.141, RVLM 0.204->0.034, vlPAG-GABA 0.015->0.000) while LC RISES 0.315->0.363 toward its 0.564 pre-split level via the excitatory CRF-R1 edge. So BA->CEm is CORRECT and WORKING; its effect is MASKED by an upstream brake.

★ LUMP #13 -- THE LUMPING DEFECT RECURSES: CEl-GABA IS ITSELF A LUMP. This is the mechanism behind CEm's silence, and it must NOT be fixed by retuning the 0.85 (which would be fitting the value to hide the missing mechanism). Real CeL delivers its inhibition onto CeM via the SOM+ and PKC-delta+ populations, which are MUTUALLY INHIBITORY -- so only ONE is active at a time and CeL's inhibition of CeM is ROUTED and SELECTIVE, never blanket. PsychSim models both populations as ONE undifferentiated CEl-GABA node delivering a blanket brake. The value makes it worse, and its own provenance says so: the 0.85 "strong" is an explicitly-labelled SCAFFOLD sized in v14 Phase 1.1 for a COMPLETELY DIFFERENT structural question -- "set so the disynaptic feed-forward inhibition DOMINATES the residual direct PVN-OT->CeA fallback edge" -- i.e. calibrated to beat ONE fallback edge onto the PRE-SPLIT LUMP. Re-pointed to CEm it is now the SOLE gate on the entire defensive output stage, a load it was never sized for. The honest reading is the standing one: the arbitrariness is not in the number, it is in the mechanism the number is standing in for. Stage C's SOM+/PKC-delta+ differentiation IS that mechanism.

LUMP #13 -- SEQUENCING CONSEQUENCE (surfaced by measurement; the design session's call): STAGE B IS NOT MEASURABLE BEFORE STAGE C. Stage B's exit measurement is "are the two CEm output populations independently addressable?" -- but splitting a node that reads 0.000 yields two populations that both read 0.000. An upstream mask cannot be attributed through until it is removed. Stage C now carries THREE deliverables, all converging on the same SOM+/PKC-delta+ differentiation: (a) it resolves the coupling by gating the CEm outputs separately; (b) it relieves the CEl 1.000 saturation by supplying CEl's missing local inhibition; and (c) it RELEASES CEm by making CEl's brake selective rather than blanket -- halving the net inhibition at any moment AND routing it. Options: invert to A -> C -> B, or fold the CEl-GABA differentiation forward into Stage B.

LUMP #13 -- the two reds at this checkpoint are the MEASURED SIGNATURE of the CEm silence, not separate defects, and both should clear when CEm is driven. (1) test_plain_threat_still_avoids: aggress 0.0239 (wants <1e-6) -- with CEm silent the CeA->HYPdm suppression is gone, so the attack effectors FLOAT UP under plain threat (HYPdm 0.173). (2) test_defensive_threat_produces_freezing: 0.050 (wants >0.10) -- the freezing floor, already red pre-split at 0.071, now DEGRADED. Mechanistically instructive: pre-split freezing came from the saturated lump CRUSHING vlPAG-GABA to 0.000, which DISINHIBITED vlPAG -- i.e. what freezing there was came from blanket suppression of the gate interneuron, not from selective drive. That is the suppression-not-competition reframe showing up in the freezing read-out itself.

LUMP #13 SELECTOR BUILD -- WHAT MEASURED TRUE. The winner-take-all microcircuit works and it SELECTS EMERGENTLY. CEl-GABA split into CEl-SOM / CEl-PKCd (mutually inhibitory, Fadok 2017); CEm split into CEm-freeze (-> vlPAG-GABA) / CEm-active (-> HYPdm); each population gates the OPPOSITE mode's output; grounded differential afferents LA->SOM+ (Li 2013, potentiated by fear conditioning) and PBN->PKC-delta+ (Han 2015, CGRP) give context somewhere to act. 100 circuits, 260 connections. MEASURED: (a) the selector picks DIFFERENT winners by context, from the drives alone with nothing scripted -- under THREAT SOM+ 0.797 vs PKC-delta+ 0.237 (passive/freezing arm wins), under AFFILIATION PKC-delta+ 0.594 vs SOM+ 0.000 (a TRUE winner-take-all: the loser is fully suppressed). (b) The CEm populations are OPPOSITELY gated and move in OPPOSITE directions by context -- CEm-freeze 0.050 / CEm-active 0.000 under threat, reversing to 0.000 / 0.052 under affiliation. That is the coupling RESOLVED at the gating level: one activation no longer drives both opposite-signed outputs. (c) CEl SATURATION RELIEVED, the ruling's deliverable (b): 1.000 -> 0.813 under threat, rest 0.264 -> 0.077, once CEl-SOM/CEl-PKCd were given their LOCAL inhibition onto CEl (initially under-built -- the mutual inhibition alone left CEl unbraked, so a saturated CEl pumped maximal SYMMETRIC drive into both populations and fought the WTA). (d) OT's Knobloch net effect is preserved MECHANISTICALLY rather than by assertion: OT->PKC-delta+ suppresses the freezing arm.

★ LUMP #13 -- THE DISINHIBITORY MOTIF FAILS AGAIN ONE LEVEL DOWN: vlPAG HAS NO THREAT-DRIVEN EXCITATORY AFFERENT. This is the same defect as CEm's, third instance in a single pass, and it is very likely the ROOT CAUSE of the long-standing freezing floor. vlPAG has exactly THREE afferents: vlPAG-GABA (inhibitory), DRN (inhibitory), and ONE excitatory -- VMH. But VMH is not a threat node: its own afferents are MPOA (inhibitory) and MeA (excitatory, social/conspecific), and it MEASURES 0.112 under threat AND 0.112 under provocation, i.e. flat at near-baseline regardless of threat. So the freezing column cannot be driven by threat NO MATTER HOW WELL THE DISINHIBITION WORKS -- CEm-freeze correctly drives vlPAG-GABA to 0.000 under threat (perfect disinhibition) and vlPAG still reads 0.000, because disinhibition RELEASES a drive and there is no threat-driven drive to release. The literature names the missing element: the medial prefrontal (prelimbic/infralimbic) projection to vlPAG is a canonical freezing driver, and PMd/SC afferents also excite the vlPAG column. NOT BUILT -- flagged for ruling, because adding a real afferent is exactly the decision that is not the build session's to take unilaterally. PATTERN NOW CONFIRMED THREE TIMES (CEm, vlPAG, and the CEl brake): PsychSim repeatedly models a disinhibitory motif by building the INHIBITION and omitting the DRIVE it is supposed to release. Worth a systematic census of every disinhibitory pathway in the connectome.
