LUMP #13 -- RESIDUAL, HONEST: the CEm output MAGNITUDES sit at/near baseline (CEm-freeze 0.050 under threat) even though the GATING is now correct and context-differentiated. The counterfactual ceiling for this substrate is known -- fully silencing the brake gave CEm 0.269 -- so the selector is delivering a fraction of the available drive, as it must, since a winner-take-all leaves the loser's gate partly closed on the winner too. Whether the remaining magnitude is adequate CANNOT be judged until the vlPAG drive gap is resolved, because the downstream read-out (freezing) is floored by that gap regardless. The effect SIZE here is therefore provisional and, by S18, provisional DOWNWARD once the substrate is completed.

★ AGE_WINDOW LIFE-COURSE BUG -- FOUND BY INDEPENDENT AUDIT, FIXED, AND IT INVALIDATES THE TIMING OF EVERY DEVELOPMENTAL RESULT TO DATE. run_life() called develop() WITHOUT age_window, so it took the default (0.0, 1.0) over span 18.0 -- and EVERY life stage re-lived ages 0->18. Measured before the fix: childhood-home 0.00->18.00, childhood-school 0.00->18.00, transition 0.00->18.00, adulthood 0.00->18.00. The ADULTHOOD stage was lived at age zero. Every age-gated mechanism (maturation curves, developmental_online_age, plasticity schedules) RESET TO INFANCY at each stage boundary. This silently violated the project's hardest constraint -- never compress or reorder developmental time -- inside the module that implements the life course. The same defect was in the F4 relational cohort, which hardcoded age_window=(0.0,1.0), so its "AGE-MATCHED" comment was false. FIXED: each stage now gets a monotonic slice proportional to its episode count, for the subject AND the cohort. Measured after: 0.00->6.75, 6.75->11.25, 11.25->14.62, 14.62->18.00, monotonic across the whole life. CONSEQUENCE, RULED: EVERY DEVELOPMENTAL CLAIM MUST BE RE-MEASURED, including whether the F1-F4 relational divergence survives correct developmental timing. Any claim with life-course ORDERING in it was measured through this -- the harsh-home-then-warm-turn condition's "turn" happened to an agent that had become age 0 again. By S18 the likely direction is deflation, but that is to be MEASURED not assumed. RESIDUAL, FLAGGED NOT DECIDED: develop() hardcodes span=18.0, so even with correct windows the adulthood stage maps onto ages 14.6-18.0 -- late adolescence, not adult years. Extending the span changes what the life course IS and is a model decision, not a bug fix.

★ F4 MARGIN GATE -- the retracted claim tried to come back on a coin flip, and the guard now stops it. The suspended F4 label test began reporting UNEXPECTED SUCCESS, which a naive read would take as confirmation of the claim retracted at 8476164. MEASURED, and it is the opposite of confirmation: baseline classifies as executive with margin 0.000158 (runner-up social_cognition); relational classifies as social_cognition with margin 0.000974 (runner-up executive). The labels differ ONLY because the two lives land on opposite sides of a 0.000158 gap -- 1/300th of the _BLEND_MARGIN 0.05 tie threshold. The test went green while the EFFECT WAS SHRINKING. FIXED by wiring the diagnostic that already existed and was read by nothing: MindReadout.margin/runner_up were computed and then DISCARDED by LifeResult, so no consumer could distinguish a confident label from a coin flip. LifeResult now carries them, and the F4 test asserts divergence AND that BOTH lives are confidently classified. The claim stays RETRACTED and the resolution condition is TIGHTENED: a label difference is evidence only when the labels themselves are trustworthy. GENERAL LESSON: a bare-argmax read-out can go green as an effect DECAYS -- absence of a margin check made the test an unreliable narrator in BOTH directions.

★ CUE-VALUE LEARNING -- THE UN-SUSPEND WAS RULED, THEN REFUTED BY ITS OWN CONFIRMING MEASUREMENT. The design session ruled that test_cue_acquires_value_from_da_gated_plasticity should be un-suspended IF its margin proved robust, reasoning (correctly) that it is a WITHIN-agent before/after test reading substrate DYNAMICS rather than an observer double-gain construct -- and therefore likely to survive the instrument correction. The measurement says otherwise, and the margin check is what caught it. Measured paired gain vs the UNPAIRED (cue-alone) control, across ages: age 4.0 paired +0.003632 / unpaired +0.005439 (ratio 0.7x); age 8.0 +0.016434 / +0.013907 (1.2x); age 15.0 -0.013863 / +0.009058 (-1.5x); age 25.0 -0.004655 / +0.010242 (-0.5x). THE TEST PASSES AT AGE 4 ONLY BECAUSE +0.0036 > 0 -- but the CUE-ALONE CONTROL GAINS MORE (+0.0054), and the paired effect goes NEGATIVE at ages 15 and 25. A learning effect smaller than its own control is not a learning effect. RULING FOLLOWED, OUTCOME INVERTED: stays SUSPENDED, and the resolution condition is unchanged (ground OFC->VTA / OFC->NAc-core). Being dynamics-measured made it a CANDIDATE to survive; it did not survive, which is the distinction working in the honest direction rather than the flattering one.

★ DA-GATED LEARNING HAS COLLAPSED BY ~2 ORDERS OF MAGNITUDE AGAINST ITS OWN DOCUMENTED SCALE (new finding, surfaced by the cue-value margin check). test_learning_requires_the_reinforcer_da_gating's own comment states the expected paired gain as "~0.3"; measured now it is +0.0036 at age 4 -- about 1/80th. So the three-factor DA-gated plasticity is not currently producing a learning signal of anything like the magnitude the suite was written around. CONSEQUENCE, and it is a second vacuous guard of the OFC-GABA kind: test_learning_requires_the_reinforcer_da_gating PASSES by asserting the unpaired change is < 0.05, which is trivially satisfied when EVERY change is ~0.005. It is a control that cannot fail because the effect it controls for no longer exists -- a green that certifies nothing. The DA-learning pathway needs its own diagnosis (the ungrounded OFC->VTA / OFC->NAc-core edges are the standing suspect, but a ~80x shortfall suggests looking wider -- candidate: whether the reinforcer actually reaches VTA and whether the eligibility trace survives the settle). Do NOT re-scale the test to the observed magnitude.

★ THE DA-LEARNING "COLLAPSE" -- DIAGNOSED, AND IT IS MOSTLY NOT A DEFECT. THE RULING'S FRAMING NEEDS CORRECTING. Bisected across 157 commits. The paired cue-value gain was +0.320588 at 128a4be/67057d9 and dropped to +0.038125 at the very next commit, 542dd48 -- with the connectome BYTE-IDENTICAL either side (77 circuits, 152 connections), so it was never a wiring change. 542dd48 is "Part 5 S10.1: experience-decreasing plasticity", a DELIBERATE, RULED mechanism: the nth relevant experience of a connection carries ~1/n of the weight (an incremental RUNNING AVERAGE) so the developed state rigidifies without a separate stabiliser. COUNTERFACTUAL PROOF (silence-the-element): at 542dd48, setting EXP_PLASTICITY_FLOOR 0.001 -> 1.0 (neutralising S10.1 and nothing else) restores the paired delta to EXACTLY +0.320588 -- the identical pre-S10.1 value. Analytically the test's 60-trial protocol should lose sum(1/n, n=1..60)=4.68 vs 60 flat = 12.8x; observed 8.4x (less because the co-activity threshold means not every trial counts for every connection). So the first and largest step of the "collapse" is a mechanism working exactly as specified. THE REAL ERROR IS A STALE EXPECTATION, NOT A BROKEN MECHANISM: the test's "~0.3 paired gain" comment PREDATES S10.1 and was never recalibrated when the plasticity regime changed underneath it. A 60-trial protocol calibrated to flat plasticity does not mean the same thing under running-average plasticity.

DA-LEARNING -- THE SECOND FRONT REMAINS OPEN (this part may still be a real defect). S10.1 accounts for 0.3206 -> 0.0381 (8.4x). The remaining 0.0381 -> 0.0036 (a further ~10.5x) accrued across later work -- the connectome grew 77->100 circuits / 152->225 connections, the four cortical E-I gates landed, and Lump #13 restructured the amygdala. Measured waypoints: faee7aa +0.038120, e33fb08 +0.032455, HEAD +0.003632. That second decline is NOT explained and is the part worth diagnosing. NOTE the discriminating control: the UNPAIRED cue-alone drift is essentially UNCHANGED across the entire 157-commit history (+0.005034 -> +0.005439), so whatever is eroding the paired gain is specific to the DA-GATED ASSOCIATIVE pathway and is not a general plasticity change. Leading suspects: R8 competitive normalisation redistributing weight as the connectome grew (more edges per postsynaptic cell = smaller share each), and the cortical E-I gates damping the DA teaching signal cumulatively. DESIGN QUESTION RAISED, NOT DECIDED: with 1/n decay and EXP_PLASTICITY_FLOOR = 0.001 (a SCAFFOLD value), an agent that has lived a full development has effectively no remaining plasticity on well-used connections -- is adult learning intended to be that rigid? The floor is the knob and it has never been grounded.

ADULT-PLASTICITY FLOOR -- GROUNDED IN DIRECTION, SCAFFOLD IN VALUE (ruled). S10.1's experience-decreasing plasticity (nth relevant experience carries ~1/n of the weight) STANDS as grounded biology: the magnitude of experience-induced synaptic and structural modification is what distinguishes DEVELOPMENTAL from ADULT plasticity after critical-period closure (Hensch 2004; Katz & Shatz 1996) -- critical periods are favourable but circumscribed, after which learning becomes harder. So rigidification of the developed state is correct, and a NONZERO floor is also correct in principle, because adult plasticity is REDUCED BUT NOT ABOLISHED -- synaptic plasticity remains possible throughout life. An adult that could not learn at all would be wrong; a floor of exactly zero would be wrong. WHAT IS NOT GROUNDED IS THE NUMBER: EXP_PLASTICITY_FLOOR = 0.001 is explicitly labelled SCAFFOLD and the literature pins the RELATION (adult << developmental, but > 0) without pinning a value for how reduced. At 0.001 a fully-developed agent has effectively no remaining plasticity on well-used connections, which may be more rigid than reduced-but-nonzero supports. OWED: ground the floor to the adult:developmental plasticity RATIO when the reward/value learning system is next characterised -- the same ground-the-relation-and-let-the-value-follow discipline used for the cortical E-I gains and the pacemaker rates. NEVER set it to make a test green.

★ FREEZING-COLUMN DRIVER -- DIAGNOSED (ruled question ANSWERED): it is NOT the CEm-freeze population; vlPAG needs its OWN grounded excitatory afferent. The ruling asked whether, once the selector differentiates the CEm outputs, the CEm-freeze population drives vlPAG, or whether vlPAG needs a separately-grounded excitatory afferent. MEASURED, and the answer is unambiguous: under threat in the INTACT model vlPAG-GABA already sits at 0.000 -- the disinhibitory gate is ALREADY FULLY OPEN -- and vlPAG still reads 0.000. Silencing vlPAG-GABA entirely (maximal disinhibition) changes vlPAG by NOTHING: still 0.000. Only when DRN is ALSO silenced -- i.e. with EVERY inhibitory input to the column removed -- does vlPAG reach 0.138, which is essentially the activation of its sole excitatory afferent VMH (0.112, and VMH is not threat-driven: MPOA-/MeA+ afferents, flat 0.112 under both threat and provocation). CONCLUSION: the CEm-freeze route is DISINHIBITORY (CEm-freeze -| vlPAG-GABA), and a disinhibitory route cannot deliver drive when the gate it opens is already open and there is no drive behind it. No amount of CEm-freeze activation can produce freezing. The ceiling of the entire column under MAXIMAL disinhibition is ~0.138. So the freezing column requires a grounded, THREAT-DRIVEN EXCITATORY afferent -- the canonical literature candidate is the medial prefrontal (prelimbic/infralimbic) projection to vlPAG, with PMd and SC as further candidates. NOT BUILT: adding a real afferent needs authorisation. This also RETIRES the framing that the freezing floor is downstream of the selector -- it is INDEPENDENT of the selector, and would have failed identically had the un-lumping never happened. The un-lumping merely stopped the saturated lump from crushing vlPAG-GABA, which is what had been manufacturing the appearance of a freezing mechanism.

STAGE-1 LIMITATION REGISTERED (S56, honest): the cortical E-I loop-gain grounding scales w(node->gate) by circuit afferent load from the dACC reference (load 3, w 0.50). vmPFC (load 5) lands at 0.8333 -- true proportionality. dlPFC (load 9) wants 1.5 but the [0,1] weight bound CLAMPS it to 1.0, so THE HEAVIEST CORTICAL NODE IS UNDER-CORRECTED. The RELATION is correct (proportional inhibitory tracking / detailed balance); the REPRESENTATION (a single bounded weight) cannot express the gain the heaviest node needs. LEVER HELD IN RESERVE (not built): the missing ~0.5x could go on the gate->node RETURN weight (dlPFC-GABA->dlPFC is 'moderate-strong', with headroom), splitting the loop gain across both limbs. Apply ONLY if a later measurement shows dlPFC's residual over-drive is load-bearing on a standing red -- do not pre-emptively tune it.

FALLBACK SIGNS VERIFIED CORRECT (S59 census, 2 off the list -- confirmed by literature, not assumed): CeA->HYPdm is genuinely INHIBITORY (CeM output neurons are GABAergic and directly inhibit the dorsomedial hypothalamus -- Gilpin, Physiology of Fear); VMHvl->HYPdm is genuinely EXCITATORY (VMHvl core is glutamatergic). Both edges carry receptor:None and were fallback-signed; the audit confirms the fallback got both right BY ACCIDENT but CORRECTLY. Consequence: the S56 aggression-block attribution holds -- at VMHvl=0.361, HYPdm sits at 0.023 because a SATURATED CeA inhibits it. This is a suppression problem, NOT a sign error.

LUMP #13 -- CeA modelled as a saturating RELAY where biology implements an internal SELECTING microcircuit (S56 Stage 2): real CeA is a mutually-inhibitory winner-take-all selector -- CEl SOM+ cells inhibit CEl PKC-delta+ cells, CEl inhibits the CEm output neurons, and ITC inhibits both, so ONE defensive output mode is SELECTED and the others suppressed (Moscarello, threat-imminence; the CeA WTA literature). The model's CeA is ONE lumped node whose SIX outputs (vlPAG-GABA, HYPdm, BNST, PVN, RVLM, LC) all fire together when it is driven -- so it saturates as a lump and suppresses HYPdm regardless of which defensive mode is appropriate. Same pattern as the PAG columns, the vlPAG-GABA selector and the VMH core/shell. The FULL un-lumping (split CeA -> CEl + CEm, re-route 18 afferents and 6 outputs, add the mutual inhibition) is a DEDICATED future pass, deferred with the other lumps; S56 Stage 2 addresses only the saturation (the missing recurrent drive-proportional brake), not the output selection.

UN-LUMPING PASS OWED (dCA2 social-recognition node, surfaced by the dev-social integration F2): the two familiarity RECOGNITION bands added this pass (IN-CONSPEC:familiar_warm->PVN-OT, IN-CONSPEC:familiar_wary->CeA) route DIRECT from cue to valuation target -- option (i), matching the grain of the 3 sibling IN-CONSPEC bands (attractive_face/formidability_cue/kin_signature all go direct; the recognition/similarity computation lives in the cue construction). The real recognition CENTRE -- dorsal-CA2 hippocampus (+ ventral-CA1 / lateral septum), which discriminates social threat from safety and carries an abstract social-VALENCE representation (Kassraian 2024 Nat Neurosci) -- is currently LUMPED into the cue-construction + direct edge, as kin_signature's chemosignal-detection->OT is. HPCv (ventral hippocampus) is already the seed's ventral-CA1 seed of it. The honest un-lumping is a DEDICATED pass that adds the explicit dCA2/vCA1/lateral-septum node and RE-ROUTES all four IN-CONSPEC recognition cues through it (adding it only for familiarity would make it inconsistent with its 3 siblings -- a partial un-lumping worse than either state). Deferred with the other ~12 lumps; not this pass.

ARC-3 EXPRESSION GAP (highest-value loop-fidelity item, surfaced by P1 b52d06f): the expression apparatus is ASYMMETRIC — L7 built the NEGATIVE-affect effectors (NuFac/NuAmb-vocal distress display, Mc freezing, the two volitional routes) but there is NO WARMTH/AFFILIATIVE display effector. So displayed_affect is <= 0 always (distress/hostility only); the smile has no effector. Consequence: the affect band of every POSITIVE exchange is currently mute — two agents who feel warmly toward each other cannot SHOW it; the warmth lives only in the rel record (P1 Change B), never crosses the channel (P1 Change A). STUDY-RELEVANT: a model where warmth cannot be displayed cannot yet show the sophropath's DEPLOYED warmth (charm as a mask) vs the ordinary person's FELT warmth — the masked-affect machinery (P1 A4) is built and waiting but can currently only mask distress, not deploy warmth. To ground when opened: an affiliative/Duchenne display route (likely periaqueductal/hypothalamic -> facial affiliative, distinct from the distress route). This is a NEW circuit (deferred from P1, correctly) and its own future expression-fidelity P-pass — NOT dust: the warmth band is half the exchange and the whole of the prosocial/charm signal.

ARCHITECTURE DECISION OWED (before P3, surfaced by the P2 write-side diagnosis): THREE unreconciled dyadic relationship stores exist — (a) GameMaster.relationships gm.rel Relationship(familiarity/affect/trust), the store P1 READS and P2a WRITES (now emergent-magnitude); (b) relations.Society Tie(standing/reciprocity/strain), role-pair keyed, its OWN fixed-delta write on is_cohesive/is_aggressive (relations.py interact); (c) RelationshipMatrix/RelationshipSlot, per-agent-per-other, the ONLY genuinely emergent-from-outcome store (RPE via ValueLearner on the App-C.9 interocepted reward) but fed SELF only and banked-but-unfed for real others (agent_bank.py:49). One cannot scale relationships to a POPULATION (P3) while three stores disagree about what a relationship IS. The decision: does RelationshipMatrix (RPE) become CANONICAL, with gm.rel/Society.Tie derived from or replaced by it? Not urgent for P2a; must be settled before P3. VTA lesson applies: the RPE store EXISTING is not a reason to wire it — that is a separate unit with its own grounding.

P2b PASS OWED (development is currently VACUOUS over a life): develop() is env-only (takes only Environment, never rel; development.py:200) and the lifecourse loops daily.py/townlife.py call converse/adjudicate ZERO times — so rel is NEVER written over a simulated childhood; accumulation happens only in explicit converse() calls. 'The record shapes development' therefore has NO path today. The ONLY honest fix is to route co-present lifecourse interactions through adjudicate/converse so rel is written by lived exchanges and read back via the SAME P1 perceive->appraisal path — NEVER bolt rel into develop() as a parallel plasticity channel. This is a real architecture pass (touches the daily loop, co-presence, who-meets-whom, performance), its own diagnosis + claim; it is the gateway to P3.

GROUNDING QUESTION OWED (surfaced by P2a): trust and familiarity are floored at 0 (clamp default bounds); affect spans [-1,1]. An outcome-scaled aggressive exchange erodes trust toward 0 but can never drive it NEGATIVE — betrayal-as-negative-trust (distrust as a distinct dimension) is not representable. P2a KEEPS the floor deliberately (not a tuning knob). IF betrayal is meant to be representable that is a grounded substrate decision for its own pass — do NOT tune the floor to make it happen; ground it in the literature (is distrust a distinct state, or the absence of trust?).

DOCUMENTED ASYMMETRY (P2a, by design): in a converse() only the actor's OPENER gets the P1 rel->appraisal colouring (perceive with partner_rel); the target's REPLY runs on `heard` (appraisal_from_act) and never calls perceive, so rel(target,actor).affect and .familiarity are behaviourally INERT in-conversation. Only rel(target,actor).TRUST bleeds into the same conversation, via _vigilance_of -> receiver_vigilance -> the `heard` appraisal (perception-gating working as intended). If BOTH participants' history should colour ONE exchange, the least-invasive route is colouring `heard` with rel(target,actor) using person.py's convention (colour-not-overwrite, familiarity-gated, scaffold gains) — but that is P2b-or-later, not P2a.

OPEN DEPENDENCY (P2a, adversarial review): P2a's tie-delta magnitude = band * win_drive, where win_drive = resp.drives[resp.behaviour] == social.py:269's 'strength' scalar for the winner. That scalar's ABSOLUTE magnitude is recorded (memory memory-layer-phase1) as 'salience-strength magnitude flagged-not-tuned'. Until P2a it was report-only; P2a makes it load-bearing on the relationship trajectory for the FIRST time. NOT a wall breach (win_drive derives from a substrate quantity in [0,1]; nothing is tuned to a target), but band*win_drive's absolute magnitude is only as grounded as 'strength' — carried forward as an OPEN dependency. P2a REUSES 'strength', it does NOT ground it; grounding strength's absolute scale is owed separately.

DESIGN QUESTION FLAGGED (P2a -> reviewer): win_drive is drive INTENSITY (the winner's own phasic pull), NOT margin over the runner-up. Consequence: a maximally-ambivalent near-tie win {aggress:0.60, avoid:0.58} moves the tie the SAME as an uncontested landslide {aggress:0.60, rest:0} — both 0.2*0.60. The ruling specified max(resp.drives.values()) [intensity] with resp.steps [decisiveness] as secondary-if-at-all, so P2a implements intensity; but if MARGIN-decisiveness (d_win - d_second, or d_win/(d_win+d_second)) is the intended meaning of 'decisively-won', that is a one-line change owed a ruling. Also the linear-through-origin form band*win_drive is itself an unforced structural choice (not grounded); re-examinable.
Default (newborn) weights: literature gives ADULT co-activation patterns, not birth values — most default weights will be flagged assumptions until better-sourced.
Exhaustive projection list: a true connectome-level 'which circuit wires to which' is incomplete; assembly must catalogue coverage and holes.
fMRI/brain-activity correlates of emotional/behavioural states are not yet mapped to circuit dynamics — a target for deeper search (task-fMRI, intracranial, developmental cohorts).
Innate-connection strengths are qualitative (strong/moderate/weak); quantitative birth strengths mostly unavailable.
Interoceptive/bodily feedback coupling gains are unquantified (and must stay mechanism-derived, not outcome-tuned).
Receptor-subtype distributions, neuromodulator spatial gradients, and glial/astrocytic contributions are not represented.
Genotype -> parameter mappings (variant -> reactivity/plasticity gain) are not yet specified.
Developmental-onset ages for many subcortical/affective circuits are approximate and often animal-informed.
Prepared-learning bias magnitudes (e.g. how much faster ancestral-threat conditioning is) are not quantified and are evolutionarily contested.
Plasticity eta(age) schedule refs (e.g. 'amygdala_high_early', 'pfc_low_early_high_late') are qualitative labels, not yet quantified curves.

Social-cognition (mentalizing) dynamics are scaffold and the connection weights are assumptions; the cortical social circuits have no rodent homolog so cannot be audited against the Allen mouse connectome -- they rest on human imaging/lesion literature (Part 3 S1).

Subcortical/limbic connectivity has NOT yet been audited against the Allen Mouse Brain Connectivity Atlas; a one-off coverage pass is scoped in MASTER Part 3 S3 (existence/direction only; weights stay scaffold).

Sign-fidelity (nucleus-level _sign): the sign is derived from each source's PRINCIPAL transmitter, so a projection whose specific transmitter differs from its source's dominant one is signed wrongly -- e.g. VP->LHb (v11 C3) is glutamatergic/aversive in the literature but VP is GABA-leading, so it is signed inhibitory (reward arm) here. Known limitation of Dale-by-nucleus; resolve ONLY by a convention-wide upgrade to projection-specific signs (uniform, cited), NEVER by a per-edge override to obtain a function.

Missing neuromodulator node: no serotonergic (dorsal/median raphe, 5-HT) source. 5-HT centrally regulates impulsivity/aggression -- a REQUIRED future node-pass (grounded, cited, reviewed), not an edge. Revisit before the CU study draws aggression-regulation conclusions.

v12a sign convention: sign is now per-connection, DERIVED from a cited dominant_receptor (params.RECEPTOR_SIGN) where receptor-determined, else the source's principal-transmitter fallback. REMAINING GAPS (documented, not fabricated): (a) genuinely receptor-heterogeneous neuromodulator targets -- DA D1/D2 (esp. SNc->DStr, near-arbitrary dominance), NA alpha2A-in-PFC (Gi-coupled but facilitatory via HCN closure -- LC->dlPFC kept + on the transmitter fallback, NOT signed - by class); (b) mixed-nucleus projections not individually determined to citation grade (MeA->{MPOA,BNST,VMH,ATL-TP}, MPOA->*, HYPdm->PVN, PVN->autonomic, VMH->PAG) -- remain on the nucleus-transmitter fallback. Fidelity improved where cited; NOT claimed complete. Ambiguities documented, never resolved by picking the sign that gives a nicer result.

v12b DRN 5-HT node: dorsal raphe + 12 receptor-signed edges (9 efferent, 3 afferent) + a scan_match aggression-regulation target. GAPS: DRN->VTA deferred (5-HT->VTA sign genuinely uncertain); median raphe (MRN) deferred (parking lot); BA/NAc/PAG receptor determinations FLAGGED (heterogeneous 5-HT receptor populations); PFC->DRN interneuron recruitment collapsed to the direct glutamatergic drive. 5HT registered as a gating neuromodulator source (NEUROMOD_SOURCE) but no connection is 5HT-gated yet (direct projections are the mechanism; gating is a future refinement).

v12b DRN microcircuit: the PFC->raphe loop is now SELF-LIMITING through a DRN GAD2+ GABAergic interneuron (DRN-GABA): vmPFC/OFC excite both the 5-HT neurons (direct, +) and the interneuron (+), which inhibits the 5-HT neurons (GABA-A, -) -- net PFC->5-HT inhibitory, stability EMERGENT from the interneuron (not a tuned weight; silence DRN-GABA and the loop runs hot). DRN->VTA restored (5-HT1A inhibitory). Remaining: median raphe (MRN) deferred; BA/NAc/PAG receptor determinations FLAGGED (heterogeneous 5-HT receptors).

PRE-EXISTING (surfaced by the DRN microcircuit, not caused by it): vmPFC rests saturated (~0.98 in v12), which over-drives the vmPFC->DRN-GABA->DRN feed-forward inhibition and makes the DRN tonic sensitive to the interneuron weight (bistable). The interneuron self-limits regardless (silence test); the DRN tonic was set to a tonically-active level. Fixing vmPFC's resting saturation is a separate pre-existing item.

v12c cortical E/I: per-region GABAergic interneurons added for the TWO DEMONSTRATED self-saturating PFC circuits (vmPFC, dlPFC) -- feedback inhibition, silence-tested. dmPFC was initially added too but the diagnostic showed its 1.0 was DOWNSTREAM of dlPFC (weak afferents 0.20; rests at 0.302 once dlPFC is braked, no interneuron of its own) -- so dmPFC joins the MASKED category with OFC, dACC, and the other cortical pyramidal circuits: their real PV/SST interneurons are a SCHEDULED addition for a future systematic cortical-E/I pass (not denied), and ANY afferent change to a masked cortical circuit must re-check whether it then saturates. The two-circuit fix is the demonstrated defect; not the whole cortical-E/I story.

ITEM-1/ITEM-2 LINK (record, not built): PFC E/I balance matures during adolescence; adolescent risk-taking is substantially prefrontal-inhibitory-control immaturity. The PFC interneuron system added here (adult set-point) is the CANDIDATE SUBSTRATE for adolescent-risk maturation -- its developmental coming-online trajectory (delaying the interneuron relative to its pyramidal circuit) is the grounded mechanism to test against the adolescent-risk curve, as its own deliberate future pass. NOT wired now.

v14 Phase 1 FLAG (CeA target-cell subtlety; bring to review, do NOT force -- instructions 1.3): PVN-OT->CeA is LEFT on the transmitter fallback (+1), NOT receptor-signed OTR+, because OT excites CeA-lateral GABAergic interneurons which then inhibit CeA output -- the NET effect on CeA output is inhibitory via an excitatory synapse onto an inhibitory cell (Knobloch et al. 2012 Neuron). v13's CeA is a SINGLE node (no CeA-GABA interneuron), so signing OTR->+ would assert OT EXCITES CeA output, the opposite of the biology. Options for reviewer: (a) defer the sign (un-representable as a single edge, recorded reason), or (b) add a grounded CeA-GABA interneuron (parallel to v13's DRN-GABA; Knobloch 2012). Awaiting ruling.

v14 Phase 1 FLAG (MPOA efferent signs; bring to review, do NOT force): MPOA->VTA, MPOA->PAG-PANIC, MPOA->VMH are LEFT on the transmitter fallback (-1), NOT receptor-signed, pending a sign determination. MPOA is mixed GABA/glutamate (galanin). Instructions 1.1 intend MPOA->VTA as + (drive to reward for parental motivation) -- a sign FLIP from the -1 fallback -- but the MPOA->VTA parental circuit likely acts via DISINHIBITION of VTA DA (a target-cell subtlety like CeA), so a direct + would assert MPOA excites VTA and may misstate the synaptic sign. Awaiting reviewer ruling on the cited receptor/transmitter + whether an interneuron representation is needed. NOT forced.

v14 Phase 1 ENUMERATION (OT->reward gating; bring to review BEFORE adding -- instructions 1.2): the DIRECT OT->reward core IS present (PVN-OT->NAc-shell, OT-gated, receptor-signed OTR+ this phase). What may be MISSING for a specific conspecific's cues to be LEARNED as rewarding via the DA teaching signal: direct OTR modulation of VTA DA to social cues -- there is NO PVN-OT->VTA edge (MPOA->VTA exists but is unsigned/subtle, see above). Candidate minimal addition: PVN-OT->VTA (OTR; OT modulation of the DA teaching signal for social cues). NOT added speculatively; enumerated for reviewer ruling.

v14 Phase 1.1 FINDING (MPOA->VTA disinhibition BLOCKED pending the VTA pacemaker-baseline element -- reviewer-ruled): the ruled MPOA->VTA disinhibition (via a VTA-GABA interneuron) cannot net-function because VTA has NO tonic dopaminergic pacemaker baseline (rests ~0.06, near-floor). Disinhibition requires tonic firing to operate against -- VTA-DA neurons are autonomous pacemakers held in check by tonic GABAergic tone (Grace & Bunney; the tonic/phasic DA distinction); removing tone releases tonic firing. With no tonic baseline, there is nothing to disinhibit, so MPOA->VTA cannot be represented as disinhibition (and forcing it would require VTA-GABA to suppress DA by ~0.45 -> DA destabilised). This is a REAL reward-system missing element -- the VTA tonic pacemaker baseline -- surfaced by MPOA->VTA but affecting the whole reward system (phasic DA, RPE, LHb->VTA disappointment, any disinhibitory afferent). RULING: MPOA->VTA stays on fallback (NOT signed, NOT forced); VTA-GABA NOT added; the VTA-pacemaker baseline is its own reward-system-completion pass (NOT built in the kinship pass v14), likely alongside the pre-CU-study inhibitory-interneuron/tonic-baseline audit. Does NOT block Phase 2 (perceptual signature, independent of the parental reward drive).

REWARD-COMPLETION PASS (pre-CU-study gate; DOWNSTREAM OF HSO -- confirmed by the full-suite VTA build failure): the attempt to pull the VTA reward-gating into the kinship pass v14 was built and FAILED the full suite (F1 uniform-setpoint invariant; F2 associative-learning collapse from tonic-DA flattening the phasic RPE). This is the third and definitive time the substrate said the VTA pacemaker is a reward-ARCHITECTURE change, not a kinship edge. DEFERRED, as one unit, to a dedicated reward-completion pass: (1) the VTA tonic dopaminergic pacemaker baseline (Grace & Bunney); (2) the tonic/phasic DA SEPARATION in the plasticity gate -- a proper RPE that reads phasic (not absolute) DA (the naive running-mean version fails; a true RPE needs the learned expectation); (3) PVN-OT->VTA (reverted here, deferred-not-deleted, Hung 2017); (4) the VTA-GABA interneuron + PVN-OT->VTA-GABA feed-forward ceiling; (5) the MPOA->VTA disinhibition + target-cell reroute onto VTA-GABA (authorised but contingent on the tonic tone, which is deferred; the direct MPOA->VTA edge stays on fallback, unchanged); (6) the read-out fix (domain read-outs excluding local inhibitory interneurons as a class) -- travels with the VTA-GABA tonic interneuron that motivates it. KEY: HSO's measured timescale hierarchy separates tonic (neuromodulatory, slow) from phasic (ionotropic, fast) DA BY CONSTRUCTION, so item (2) is provided generally by HSO rather than as a bespoke fix -- the reward-completion pass therefore lands ON the HSO-rebuilt architecture, not before it. The F2 finding is this pass's justification: the reward system's tonic/phasic-DA conflation is a real simplification that must be completed before any reward conclusion (incl. the CU study's reward manipulations) is drawn.

v14 kinship Phase-2 (DEFERRED, design-session flagged): self-referent kin RECOGNITION currently lives in the percept layer (signature_match -- a perceptual self-similarity match, biologically apt: the armpit effect / self-referent phenotype matching is perceptual, not cognitive; Mateo & Johnston 2000). Whether to ALSO represent the NEURAL substrate of self-referent recognition as explicit circuitry (e.g. MeA->aIns/dmPFC 'this matches me' processing) is deferred -- NOT needed for the kinship-behaviour mechanism (nepotism emerges from the OT-routed affiliation cue; keystone-clean, signature-only + self-referent), but potentially wanted for anatomical completeness or a future social-cognition/CU study that examines the recognition substrate itself. Flagged, not dropped.

Teaching-signal consistency (DEFERRED, reviewer-flagged): R5 consolidation now uses a PHASIC teaching signal (engine.neuromod_teaching -- source activation above its running mean_activity baseline; tonic cancels), but reward_signal() (agent accessor) and the behaviour DA-gain still read the ABSOLUTE neuromod_output. reward_signal() is described as 'the RPE', which is phasic -- so its absolute value is a latent inconsistency. NOT changed now (fix-what's-broken = the gate; don't change the accessor for consistency alone). Make it phasic when something reading it needs phasic, or in a teaching-signal-consistency pass.

Learning-pathways LC completion: CeA->LC (CRF-R1) added as the aversive afferent + LC->LC alpha2 autoreceptor brake. PBN->LC and NTS->LC are grounded noradrenergic LC afferents but DEFERRED -- their sources carry no aversive drive in the current model (would be inert-by-construction). Add WITH their aversive drive when it exists. ▲ RESOLVED (v14 D6 fix #2 door 1): PBN->LC / NTS->LC were never DORMANT -- they were WRONG-TARGET. Aston-Jones 1986: PBN/NTS do NOT project to LC (terminate adjacent); PGi is their integrator. Built PBN->PGi, NTS->PGi, nociception->PGi, PGi->LC (strong). CeA->LC untouched at moderate.

BF-ACh (cholinergic attention/salience source) is UNAFFERENTED -- it never fires, so the 26 ACh-gated edges (rSMG-TPJ/dmPFC/pSTS/PCun-PCC social-cognition + V1/S1/S2/A1/aIns sensory) gate a dead teaching signal (exposed by the phasic teaching-signal fix; previously fake tonic-gated). OFF the current control/CU critical path; no ACh-gated PFC-control edge. REGISTER: afferent-complete as its own grounded step (PVN-OT/LC class) when the attention/social-cognition work is on the path -- sequenced to when load-bearing, not dropped.

SNc (nigrostriatal DA source) is UNAFFERENTED, but DA WORKS via VTA (neuromod source = mean of VTA+SNc; VTA firing suffices). Latent incompleteness, currently masked. REGISTER: complete when nigrostriatal DA specifically matters.

CeA activity-driven self-inhibition (intra-amygdala CeAl->CeAm GABAergic feedback / habituation) is a REAL absent mechanism, but adding it as a TONIC CeA->CeA-GABA edge damps baseline/acute CeA, which DISINHIBITS the attack effectors (CeA->PAG / CeA->HYPdm are inhibitory) and BREAKS the v9 reactive-aggression keystone (test_aggression_pathway: restrain->aggress). It also does NOT de-load-bear alpha2. DEFERRED: if ever added, it must be PHASIC (habituation engages on sustained, not acute, CeA) so it does not break the keystone. Not needed once CeA->LC is phasic (the latch is dissolved at its source).

phasic_drive as a general per-edge property: introduced specifically for CeA->LC (grounded in phasic CRF release) using the existing mean_activity machinery. Other edges whose biology is phasic/adapting could use it; revisit as a general audit if more edges need it. Done the grounded specific thing here; general question flagged. LINKED (v14): this question now ALSO governs (i) the vicarious DISPLAY (_add_consequence_percept: max(0, activation - mean_activity)) -- whether a sustained distress display should adapt to ZERO, which decides whether chronic-adversity agents becoming invisible to observers is real or an artifact; and (ii) the EMOTIONAL-CONTAGION loop, whose stability currently DEPENDS on that adaptation. Any revision of phasic character must re-check both in the same change.

PROVISIONAL neuromod-hub baselines/setpoints: LC baseline is now electrophysiology-grounded (0.15), but the other neuromodulator hubs still carry the generic 0.05/0.1 defaults (never individually grounded). Sweep and ground each from its own physiology when the system is complete -- baseline activation for a given firing rate depends on the whole normalized system, not yet fully assembled. Values are 'set as faithfully as possible now, pending the complete-system retune', NOT done. PAIRED-VALUE RULE (v14, LC is the first demonstration): baseline_activation and homeostatic_setpoint describe the same quantity (the circuit's intrinsic target firing rate) and MUST be set together -- the generic 0.05/0.1 default PAIR breaks the moment one half is individually grounded (LC baseline 0.15 with the default setpoint 0.1 eroded CeA->LC). When grounding any hub's baseline, ground its setpoint on the same citation. ESCALATED (v14, ruled) -- this is a KNOWN SYSTEMATIC BIAS, not cleanup: the 0.1 homeostatic_setpoint is UNGROUNDED across 82 circuits, and LC has now demonstrated the default can be materially wrong in a way that COMPOUNDS. ANY circuit whose true homeostatic firing-rate target EXCEEDS the 0.1 default is being persistently OVER-SUPPRESSED -- its afferents eroded in proportion to how ACTIVE it is. We do not currently know which circuits those are. Uniform-0.1 is a SCAFFOLD, not a grounding (uniformity cannot be a design principle: LC pacemakers ~1-3 Hz tonic, DA neurons burst, cortical pyramidals far lower). The paired baseline/setpoint describe ONE quantity (a circuit's intrinsic target rate) and must be grounded TOGETHER, per-circuit. AUDIT HOME: the future faithful self-regulation mechanism (below) -- the thing that should SET/regulate firing-rate targets from real homeostatic dynamics rather than a global placeholder.

FUTURE faithful self-regulation / developmental tuning mechanism (literature-backed; build when the system is complete): a spawn-time-tune + early-years-monitor mechanism with stability EMERGENT, never an optimizer reaching into weights to force stability. Core = HOMEOSTATIC PLASTICITY (Hebbian/BCM is intrinsically destabilizing -> the CeA<->LC latch was an instance; the brain stabilizes via slow homeostatic excitability/synaptic-scaling negative feedback; our R4 scaling is a partial piece). DEVELOPMENTALLY STAGED (juvenile vs mature homeostatic forms, recruited to the circuit's needs). MATURING INHIBITION + critical-period gating (PV interneuron maturation lags excitatory development, gates critical periods = real runaway-prevention). EXECUTIVE maturation is a LATER top-down contributor (the maturing PFC->control machinery this arc builds), NOT the initial tuner. Test the usual way: does stability EMERGE from mechanism, or is a value/optimizer carrying it? LINKED: this mechanism is the AUDIT HOME for the ungrounded uniform-0.1 homeostatic_setpoint across 82 circuits (see the provisional baselines/setpoints entry) -- it is precisely what should be setting firing-rate targets from real homeostatic dynamics instead of a global placeholder.

NA-ROBUSTNESS OF BEHAVIOURAL READ-OUTS (general finding): several read-outs were established/validated while LC was structurally dead (unafferented -> NA flat 0.05), so they were never tested against a live, correct tonic NA. A correct NA can expose a read-out as CONFLATING tonic NA tone with the signal it claims to measure. PINNED+FIXED instance: punishment_learning summed DEFENSIVE_OUTPUT=(CeA,PAG,BA) while LC drives CeA+BA directly -> confounded by construction; fixed with a yoked unpaired control (tone-invariant, validated). Per-read-out question for each affected assertion: real NA consequence (re-baseline honestly, mechanism documented) vs tone/signal conflation (fix the read-out on principle, validate tone-invariant). Will RECUR as the other dead hubs (BF-ACh, SNc) are afferent-completed -- audit read-outs then.

CU punishment 'signature' RETIRED as an artifact (v14 CU re-examination, ruled): the graded punishment-learning deficit appeared under a tonic-NA-confounded TEACHING signal read through a tonic-NA-confounded MEASUREMENT (doubly confounded) -- held as suspect precisely because it looked like the wanted finding. Cleaned through the full cascade (CRF-R1 -> phasic teaching -> phasic CeA->LC -> grounded LC pacemaker) and re-measured with a validated tone-invariant yoked read-out, multi-seed (12 temperaments): every throttle LEARNS (no failure-to-learn; all > -0.02, seed-robust) -> 'weak, not a failure' HOLDS on a trustworthy read-out. The robust CU signature is the reads-but-doesn't-feel dissociation, NOT the punishment deficit. FINDING to keep: the throttle->learning relation is ROBUSTLY NON-MONOTONE (U-shaped; 0.5 is the dip, 1.0 recovers) in 12/12 seeds -- a real feature (not noise), mechanism not yet traced; revisit.

ACTING-READINESS dual-systems peak -- child-comparison half NOT reproduced (v14, ruled: register don't drop). teen<=ADULT is robust (asserted). teen<=CHILD is NOT robust -- flips with reward intensity (holds 0.6/0.9, fails 0.7/0.8; 1-2 step margins); the grounded LC pacemaker (tonic NA -> LC->dlPFC -> executive_hold, age-graded by dlPFC late maturation -- a real, mechanistically-sensible effect) nudged the default case over. The literature holds the adolescent risk PEAK to be robust, so the substrate not reproducing the child-comparison is INFORMATION. Candidates: (1) a real gap in the assembled dual-systems circuitry; (2) read-out mismatch -- BG steps-to-approach may not operationalise sensation-seeking/risk-taking; (3) expected partial-assembly fragility. Revisit when the relevant reward/control components land.

R4 HOMEOSTATIC LOOP HAS NO PLASTICITY GUARD (v14, register): engine.py R4 scales ALL incoming weights (guards = live_conn / not pruned only), so plasticity_coeff_schedule_ref=None does NOT exempt an edge from homeostatic scaling. A 'non-plastic' structural edge (correct category call) can still be modified by R4 -- the alpha2 autoreceptor survives ONLY because it is bounds-pinned [0.5,0.5]. RULE: any future 'non-plastic' designation must ALSO bounds-pin to actually be non-plastic. OPEN QUESTION: should R4 skip plasticity_schedule=None edges outright, so 'non-plastic' means what it says in one place instead of requiring two mechanisms to enforce it?

EVENT-DRIVEN AFFERENT EROSION from a baseline/setpoint mismatch (v14 finding, FIXED for LC; the reason the paired-value rule matters). With LC baseline grounded to 0.15 but its setpoint left at the 0.1 scaffold default, R4 homeostasis fought the pacemaker. NOT rest-driven: at pure rest the alpha2 autoreceptor pulls LC to 0.10 == the 0.1 setpoint, so homeo is neutral and CeA->LC is stable through 120k steps. It is EVENT-driven: LC fires on aversive events -> mean_activity rises ABOVE the 0.1 setpoint -> homeo scales LC's afferents down -> CeA->LC erodes -7.4%/60k with events (0.0% once the setpoint is paired at 0.15). IMPLICATION (why this is not housekeeping): the MORE aversive events an agent experiences, the MORE its aversive-LEARNING pathway erodes -- experience of threat progressively destroying the capacity to learn from threat, in proportion to threat experienced. A HARSH-reared agent would end up with a systematically weaker NA teaching signal than a WARM-reared one, purely as an artifact -- silently biasing the core warm-vs-harsh developmental manipulation the studies rest on, in a plausible-looking direction. Any future baseline/setpoint grounding must be checked for this class of artifact.

PRINCIPLE (v14, from the vicarious-route diagnostic -- the headline lesson): 'NO RESULT IS A TARGET' protects against AIMING AT an answer; it does NOT protect against an EXPERIMENT THAT CANNOT ANSWER. The empathy-throttle probe of vicarious aversive learning is the exemplar: throttling AFFECTIVE_EMPATHY abolishes the vicarious NA teaching signal (0.212 -> 0.000), but AFFECTIVE_EMPATHY CONTAINS CeA and CeA is the sole afferent of LC -- so the manipulation hits the teaching pathway's own node. 'Low affective empathy impairs vicarious learning' is ENTAILED BY THE SHARED NODE, true by construction of the instrument, not an emergent result. The shared anatomy is honest (CeA genuinely belongs to both), so the STRUCTURAL claim is real -- but it is not an independent test, and reporting it as one would be a serious overclaim. Before running any manipulation as a test, ask whether the instrument can answer the question at all. STANDING CHECK -- CONSTRUCT VALIDITY, distinct from no-result-is-a-target: BEFORE any throttle/lesion-based claim, VERIFY THE MANIPULATION SET DOES NOT CONTAIN THE MECHANISM'S OWN NODES. If it does, the result is ENTAILED and can only be reported as STRUCTURE, never as an independent test. A tautological manipulation passes the no-aiming check and still yields nothing.

THROTTLE-SET AUDIT (v14, ruled -- required): AFFECTIVE_EMPATHY = (LA, BA, CeA, MeA, aIns) is the CU study's PRIMARY INSTRUMENT, and it contains CeA -- which is ALSO the aggression source (CeA->PAG/HYPdm) and the threat hub, and (post-LC-arc) the sole afferent of LC / the aversive teaching pathway. Any result probed with this throttle may be entailed by the shared node rather than emergent. Audit every claim that rests on this instrument for that class of confound, and consider whether the throttle set can be narrowed to the affective-empathy-specific population without silently manipulating the pathway under test.

CeA HOMEOSTATIC SETPOINT -- a severe instance of the known systematic bias (v14, DEFERRED verification). CeA rests at mean_activity ~0.46-0.55 against its UNGROUNDED scaffold setpoint of 0.1 -- an erosion pressure of ~0.36-0.45, i.e. ~7-9x the 0.05 gap that was silently biasing warm-vs-harsh rearing via LC before the paired-value fix. ALL 12 of CeA's afferents are unpinned, including SC-Pv->CeA (the vicarious route's own input) and the innate nociception reinforcer link. So R4 persistently erodes the entire threat/vicarious input structure in proportion to how active CeA is -- and CeA is the most active hub. CONSEQUENCE: this one ungrounded number BOTH saturates the vicarious-vs-direct comparison (CeA is at/near ceiling for both) AND erodes the pathway over the life-course, so the 'does vicarious control-edge tuning ACCUMULATE over a life?' question is currently UNANSWERABLE, not merely unestablished. DEFER that verification rather than attempt it. Resolve with CeA's grounded baseline+setpoint pair (see the provisional baselines/setpoints entry and its audit home, the faithful self-regulation mechanism). CRITICAL NUANCE (ruled): unlike LC's, this pressure is SELF-LIMITING rather than UNSATISFIABLE -- CeA's elevation is AFFERENT-DRIVEN, so the homeostat CAN reach its 0.1 target by scaling those afferents down. THAT IS THE PROBLEM: CeA's threat responsiveness will DRIFT DOWNWARD over developmental time TOWARD AN UNGROUNDED SCAFFOLD CONSTANT -- a developmental trajectory driven by a placeholder rather than by biology or experience. (LC's mismatch was visible because it could never settle; CeA's is invisible because it can.) The two flags interact: CeA's elevated resting level is ALSO what saturates the vicarious/direct comparison -- one ungrounded operating point, two blocked measurements.

VICARIOUS AVERSIVE ROUTE IS EMERGENT (v14 diagnostic, nothing built): observing another's distress already drives the perceiver CeA->1.000 -> CeA->LC -> phasic NA 0.212, essentially IDENTICAL to direct punishment (0.208), via the pre-existing SC-Pv->CeA plus the LC arc's CeA->LC. It REACHES the NA-gated control edges (dmPFC->LA +0.0003, vlPFC->ITC +0.0009 over 60 vicarious exposures; the DA-gated vmPFC->ITC correctly unchanged). So the LC completion unblocked vicarious aversive learning with NO new mechanism -- the build is ROUTING (present the other's CONSEQUENCE, which the Arena does not yet do) not construction. NOTE: vicarious == direct at equal gain. 'Vicarious < direct' is a FINDING, not a mechanism -- it must NOT be built in (neither a gain term nor a chosen cue intensity: an intensity picked because it produces the reduction is a coded constant in a perceptual costume). Build the faithful STRUCTURAL difference (observed distress reaches CeA via the affective route only; direct pain reaches CeA AND the sensory-discriminative route) and MEASURE what emerges. Equal is a finding to investigate, not to code around.

VICARIOUS vs DIRECT -- measured AS-FOUND (v14, routing built; nothing coded). The faithful STRUCTURAL dissociation is real and already in the substrate: DIRECT pain (IN-SOMATO:nociception) engages CeA AND the sensory-discriminative route (VPL 0.085->0.536, S1 0.149->0.449, S2-PPC 0.362->0.626); OBSERVED distress (distal senses -> SC-Pv -> CeA) engages the AFFECTIVE route ONLY -- VPL/S1/S2 stay at rest. That is the established vicarious-pain dissociation, present without being built. RESULT: at the realistic ROUTED magnitude (the bearer's own evoked distress display, 0.472) vicarious < direct EMERGED with no gain term and no chosen intensity: NA 0.127 vs 0.208, CeA 0.744 vs 1.000 -- the reduction arises from the DISPLAY TRANSDUCTION (an agent's evoked distress display is sub-maximal relative to the noxious stimulus that caused it). MEASUREMENT LIMIT (report with the result, do not over-read it): the DIRECT arm SATURATES -- CeA pins at 1.000 and NA flattens at ~0.208 for every drive >= 0.4 -- so the direct value is a CEILING, not a measure. The vicarious/direct RATIO therefore cannot be quantified at CeA's current operating point (rests 0.550, ceiling 1.000); the observed difference is a LOWER BOUND (direct is understated). The earlier 'vicarious ~= direct' reading (0.212 vs 0.208) was exactly this artifact -- BOTH arms pinned at ceiling -- NOT evidence of equality. Resolve with CeA's operating point (see the CeA setpoint entry). LIFE-COURSE ACCUMULATION of the ~1e-4/exposure control-edge tuning remains DEFERRED: it would be accumulation-against-erosion of unknown size, uninterpretable.

EMOTIONAL-CONTAGION LOOP -- stable ONLY because the display is phasic (v14, registered; do not act now). The vicarious routing creates a genuine CROSS-AGENT POSITIVE FEEDBACK loop: A's distress -> display -> B's CeA -> B's distress -> display -> A's CeA -> ... This is emotional contagion, a real phenomenon, and it is good that it exists. It does NOT run away (verified: arena viable 0.904, settled) because the display is PHASIC -- max(0, activation - mean_activity) adapts, so sustained distress stops being displayed and the loop gain falls to ZERO. That is the SAME phasic property that dissolved the CeA<->LC latch. CONSEQUENCE: the contagion loop's stability currently DEPENDS on the display's phasic adaptation, and whether the display SHOULD be phasic is itself an OPEN QUESTION (see the per-edge phasic-character entry). *** IF THE DISPLAY'S PHASIC CHARACTER IS EVER REVISED, THE CONTAGION LOOP MUST BE RE-CHECKED IN THE SAME CHANGE. *** A future non-adapting display removes the only thing currently damping this loop.

CHRONIC DISTRESS BECOMES INVISIBLE -- the per-edge-phasic question applied to the DISPLAY (v14, registered; study-relevant; do not act now). Because the display is the bearer's evoked distress above its own RUNNING AVERAGE baseline, an agent in SUSTAINED distress ADAPTS and stops displaying -- so observers stop learning vicariously from it. MEASURED (bearer held at nociception 0.9): tick 18 CeA=1.000 display=0.474; tick 100 display=0.248; tick 200 display=0.043; tick 800+ CeA STILL 1.000 (maximum distress) but display=0.000 -- COMPLETELY invisible, not merely reduced. Display habituation is real, but people in sustained pain do not stop showing it ENTIRELY. Whether our display should adapt TO ZERO is the per-edge phasic-character question applied to the display. This bears DIRECTLY on the CHRONIC-ADVERSITY conditions the studies care about: a chronically distressed child that becomes invisible to observers -- and from whom others therefore stop learning -- is either a REAL phenomenon or an ARTIFACT of the adaptive baseline, and we do not currently know which. Resolve with the per-edge phasic-character question; re-check the contagion loop in the same change. ▲ SETTLED (v14 Phase C): the display now reads the EFFECTOR output above the bearer's FIXED rest activation (rest_activation), not the running mean -- so chronic distress stays visible while a resting face displays nothing. Closed at source.

PRINCIPLE (v14 Expression Phase A -- record it): A PASSING KEYSTONE CERTIFIES THE OUTCOME, NOT THE MECHANISM THAT PRODUCED IT. An artifact can hold a keystone, and then the keystone certifies nothing. ALWAYS ASK WHAT IS HOLDING IT. Instance: the v9 NEUTRAL FLOOR (no provocation -> no aggression) -- of which the master says 'that last check is the load-bearing one... the floor holding is how the substrate proves it did not smuggle the answer in; this is the pattern every later keystone copies' -- was PASSING FOR THE WRONG REASON. It held because CeA->PAG(-,0.70) tonically suppressed a LUMPED node, while CeA's own citation (Tovote 2016) puts it on the FREEZING column: CeA does not project to dPAG at all. The floor's LOGIC was right; its MECHANISM was luck. It did NOT mean aggression was coded (the CeA->HYPdm half stands, untouched) -- it meant the check that would have caught it was not checking. The pattern every later keystone copies was itself resting on a lumped node.

PRINCIPLE 6 EXTENDED (v14, ruled): no grounded values into a partial assembly -- AND NO BEHAVIOURAL CHARACTERISATION FROM ONE EITHER. A known-incomplete assembly is expected to misbehave; characterising a flip it produces would be inventing a finding out of a gap. Instance: the adult provocation flip (restrain->aggress) was NOT a second result -- it had ONE cause with the floor flip (dPAG had lost an inhibitory input it should never have had, and nothing real had replaced it; the adult PFC brake's sufficiency was resting on the same artifact). Both resolved when the real element landed at its grounded rate. Neither was characterised.

DOMAIN IS A THROTTLE SURFACE (v14 -- standing hazard; joins the throttle-set audit as the same class of check). circuit.domain is not taxonomy: seed_substrate throttles BY DOMAIN, so every circuit's domain silently defines what a temperament dial reaches, and scan's _THROTTLEABLE_DOMAINS + the domain-mean read-outs key on it too. DOMAIN ASSIGNMENT IS A CONSTRUCT-VALIDITY DECISION. Caught in build: NuAmb-vocal/NuFac initially inherited `defensive_threat` from the PAG template -- a low-THREAT temperament would have throttled the FACIAL MOTOR NUCLEUS, making 'low-threat agents show less facial expression' TRUE BY CONSTRUCTION (the second construct-validity bug of the AFFECTIVE_EMPATHY class caught in this arc, both before they became findings). Fixed to interoception_autonomic (the effector limb). BUT branchiomotor nuclei have NO honest home in the seven domains: NuFac, NuAmb-vocal and the Phase-D cortical motor nodes need an EIGHTH domain -- motor/effector -- and IT MUST NOT BE REACHABLE BY A TEMPERAMENT DIAL. PHASE D PREREQUISITE; not built now.

A+B FALSIFICATION -- NARROWED, not re-opened (v14 Phase A). The falsification of the ruled A+B latch fix ran through BOTH CeA->PAG and CeA->HYPdm ('damping CeA disinhibits attack'). The HYPdm half SURVIVES; the PAG half DISSOLVES (CeA's cited projection is to the freezing column). So the CONCLUSION (B breaks the keystone) STANDS, on a NARROWER basis than recorded. BUT it was measured against a floor we now know was artifact-held, so the TEST should be re-run now the floor is restored honestly. Registered; B is NOT re-opened (not on this path).

PAG-PANIC LIKELY NEEDS ITS OWN GATE (v14 -- register for Phase B, do not build now). Stempel & Evans 2024 state the general architecture: 'Disinhibition of the PAG has been suggested as a mechanism for initiating other instinctive behaviours, such as VOCALISATIONS and freezing, with inhibitory long-range projections from forebrain regions inhibiting local GABAergic circuits within the PAG.' That is CeA->vlPAG-GABA arrived at independently from a different literature, and stated as the RULE: one architecture, every column -- a tonically-active local GABA gate, disinhibited by long-range forebrain inhibitory projections. Since the same sentence names VOCALISATION as disinhibition-initiated, PAG-PANIC (the model's self-declared vocalisation column) very likely needs its own gate. Belongs with the vocal limb (Phase B).

dPAG-GABA IN-NETWORK RATE RUNS ~2x THE OBSERVED (v14 Phase A -- reported, NOT tuned). Grounded baseline 0.19 (intrinsic 6.2 Hz under synaptic blockade / 32.2 Hz strong-drive reference). In the PAPER, synaptic input pushes the gate DOWN: intrinsic 6.2 Hz -> in-network spontaneous 4.7 Hz (= 0.146 normalised). In the MODEL it pushes UP: 0.19 -> settles 0.289 (~9.3 Hz), 2.0x the observed in-network rate -- because DRN->dPAG-GABA (5-HT2A, excitatory) is currently its ONLY input. DIRECTIONALLY WRONG: the real network dampens this cell; ours excites it. CANDIDATE: a missing inhibitory/other input to the gate. The floor holds regardless (dPAG=0.0000, matching the paper's near-silent VGluT2+ output at 0.11 Hz). Reported for the audit; NOT tuned.

dPAG-GABA's RELEASE IS MISSING -- the escape circuit is INCOMPLETE (v14, ruled: register, do NOT build now). Reported in Phase A as a ~2x in-network discrepancy that was DIRECTIONALLY wrong: the paper's synaptic input pushes the gate DOWN (intrinsic 6.2 Hz -> in-network spontaneous 4.7 Hz) while ours pushes it UP (0.19 -> 0.289, ~9.3 Hz), because DRN->dPAG-GABA (5-HT2A, excitatory) is currently its ONLY input. Principle 1 says that is a MISSING INHIBITORY AFFERENT, and the same paper names its class: 'Disinhibition of the PAG has been suggested as a mechanism for initiating other instinctive behaviours... with INHIBITORY LONG-RANGE PROJECTIONS FROM FOREBRAIN REGIONS INHIBITING LOCAL GABAergic CIRCUITS WITHIN THE PAG.' And the measurement names its function: VGAT+ activity TRANSIENTLY DECREASES AT ESCAPE ONSET. So something inhibits dPAG-GABA to RELEASE escape -- the gate is opened by disinhibition, exactly as CeA->vlPAG-GABA opens freezing. WE HAVE THE GATE BUT NOT ITS RELEASE, which is why our in-network rate sits ABOVE intrinsic instead of below it. This is a defensive-INITIATION question, not an expression one, and it needs its own grounding pass on WHICH forebrain source. CONSEQUENCE: the escape circuit is not yet complete, and ANY ESCAPE/FLIGHT CLAIM IS PROVISIONAL until it is.

DERIVED SETS AUTO-EXTEND AND WILL SWALLOW WHAT IS ADDED AFTER THEM (v14 -- standing hazard, second instance of the domain-is-a-throttle-surface class). scan.throttleable_circuits() is DERIVED from domain tags and auto-extends -- a GOOD design (it prevents curation drift) and EXACTLY why it bit silently: Expression Phase A added NuFac/NuAmb-vocal into `interoception_autonomic` and they were enrolled into the throttleable set automatically, making 'low-interoception agents show less facial expression' TRUE BY CONSTRUCTION -- the same bug as AFFECTIVE_EMPATHY, one domain over. It would also have COLLAPSED the expression display's whole justification (Phase C reads effectors precisely BECAUSE the throttle does not contain them; the tautology would have returned through the domain door). RESOLVED for this instance by the `motor_effector` domain (excluded from _THROTTLEABLE_DOMAINS, unmapped by _TEMPERAMENT_DOMAIN) and the `structural_element` property (excluded from BOTH throttle surfaces -- temperament seeding AND scan search). GENERAL RULE: when adding a circuit, ask which derived sets will silently absorb it. Joins the throttle-set audit.

THROTTLING AN INHIBITORY GATE IS DIRECTIONALLY PERVERSE -- SCOPE QUESTION OPEN (v14; dPAG-GABA RULED + fixed, the other five NOT actioned). Throttling a local inhibitory gate DISINHIBITS its target, so a 'less reactive' temperament dial yields MORE output. Measured, live: a low-THREAT/low-CONTROL temperament currently throttles CeA-GABA, DRN-GABA, vlPAG-GABA, dlPFC-GABA and vmPFC-GABA at 0.60 each -- i.e. a low-threat agent gets a DISINHIBITED CeA (more fear output) and a low-control agent a disinhibited PFC. dPAG-GABA is now pinned (structural_element); THE OTHER FIVE ARE NOT, pending a scope ruling: the alpha2 argument ('a structural element is not a manipulation surface') applies to the whole gate class, but the ruling named only dPAG-GABA (whose case is strongest -- an autonomous pacemaker with a grounded rate). NOTE a real distinction the ruling may want: the TEMPERAMENT throttle is a REACTIVITY DIAL (perverse on any gate) whereas the SCAN is a LESION SEARCH (lesioning an interneuron is a legitimate experiment) -- these may not warrant the same exclusion.

*** THE TEMPERAMENT MODEL FUSES REACTIVITY AND REGULATION -- and the thesis's central construct is a dissociation between them (v14, ruled: REGISTER FOR ITS OWN PASS, do NOT act on it here; it is not on the expression path and must not balloon this level). WHY the temperament dial is perverse on gates at all: Rothbart's temperament construct has TWO components -- REACTIVITY and SELF-REGULATION -- and in this substrate the DRIVEN circuits ARE the reactivity while the GATES ARE the regulation. seed_substrate scales a whole DOMAIN uniformly, so it hits both: 'low THREAT' comes out as 'less reactive AND less regulated', which is not what it names and not what temperament is. THESIS-CRITICAL, not housekeeping: effortful control is itself a temperament construct in the CU literature; and more directly -- SOPHROSYNE (self-command) IS regulation while psychopathic disposition IS reactivity, so a high-functioning, adaptively-expressed disposition IS PRECISELY A REACTIVITY/REGULATION DISSOCIATION: low reactivity, HIGH self-command. THE CURRENT DIAL CANNOT EXPRESS THAT PHENOTYPE AT ALL, because one knob moves both. The model's central construct is a dissociation the temperament model fuses BY CONSTRUCTION. NEEDS: reactivity and regulation as SEPARATE surfaces. Belongs in the return-path register ABOVE the CU study. The expression work touches it from the other side -- the volitional suppressor is a regulation element too. INTERIM: the gate class is excluded from the temperament surface (structural_element), which stops the perversity but does NOT give regulation its own dial -- that is the pass this entry is for.

GATE CLASS -- the temperament exclusion, scoped (v14, ruled). structural_element now marks the whole class: ITC, CeA-GABA, vlPAG-GABA, dPAG-GABA, DRN-GABA, vmPFC-GABA, dlPFC-GABA. Per-circuit in the SEED with a reason each (data, like dominant_receptor) so the query stays DERIVED and never becomes a curated list. THREE SURFACES, and the property speaks to TWO: not a learned association (PLASTICITY -- pinned per-edge via weight_bounds), not a reactivity dial (TEMPERAMENT -- seed_substrate skips them) -- but STILL LESIONABLE (the SCAN is an experiment, not a claim; silencing VGAT+ dPAG is exactly the experiment that PROVED the gate sets the escape threshold, and we ran the same silence-the-element test ourselves; forbidding it would blind the scan to a whole class of phenotypes, since every column has a gate). NOTE the ITC case is the consequential one and was missed on the first sweep: it is the extinction gate AND the cell the entire prefrontal control route runs through (vmPFC->ITC / vlPFC->ITC exist because glutamatergic PFC cannot inhibit the amygdala directly), so throttling it made 'low-threat agents show impaired extinction' true by construction. (SC-Pv matched the pattern spuriously -- a sensory relay, not a gate. Not in scope.)

DOMAIN AGGREGATES ARE NOT OUTPUT MEASURES -- and they degrade on their own (v14, ruled: register, nothing to fix now). Demonstrated concretely by the gate-class golden shift: un-throttling the gates makes them MORE active -> MORE inhibition -> LESS defensive output -- yet the `defensive_threat` domain aggregate went UP (+0.010). THE AGGREGATE MOVED OPPOSITE TO THE THING IT IS NAMED AFTER. Cause: a mean-of-activation over a domain is not a measure of that domain's OUTPUT once the domain contains both the DRIVERS and their BRAKES -- a set whose members have OPPOSING SIGNS, summed as though commensurate. Same class as the AFFECTIVE_EMPATHY overlap and the domain-is-a-throttle-surface hazard: A SET WHOSE MEMBERS ARE NOT COMMENSURATE. NOT blocking today: the golden is a REGRESSION PIN (it must be stable and honestly regenerated, not semantically interpretable -- it is both); the study read-outs use CIRCUIT LISTS, not domain aggregates; and _domain_throttle takes a max over THROTTLE values, not activations. BUT IT GETS WORSE ON ITS OWN: the architecture is 'every column has a gate', so EVERY GATE ADDED MAKES EVERY DOMAIN AGGREGATE LESS INTERPRETABLE -- silently, and in the direction that FLATTERS. STANDING RULE: never read a domain mean as 'how much X is this agent'. If a per-domain OUTPUT measure is ever wanted it must be the DRIVEN MEMBERS ONLY, or drivers-minus-gates -- stated, not summed. Joins the throttle-set audit.

RESPIRATORY RHYTHM IS ITS OWN PASS -- vocalisation is currently UN-BREATH-GATED (v14 Phase B, ruled: register, do not build). preBotC is absent. It inhibits the NRA's vocal premotor population (RAmVOC) so that 'inspiration-needs OVERRIDE RAmVOC-mediated vocal-cord closure'; ablating that inhibition 'compromised inspiration gating of laryngeal adduction, resulting in DISCOORDINATION of vocalization with respiration'. *** NOT the third instance of the local-gate architecture -- that was an over-generalisation and is CORRECTED: vlPAG-GABA/dPAG-GABA are LOCAL, TONIC, AUTONOMOUS populations that set a THRESHOLD released by disinhibition; preBotC->RAmVOC is a REMOTE RHYTHM GENERATOR imposing a PRIORITY between incompatible motor acts (you cannot inhale and close the cords at once). Both are inhibition; one is a threshold, the other is a TRAFFIC RULE. A fourth inhibitory thing is not automatically the third instance of a pattern. *** SCOPE: preBotC is a rhythm generator (an autonomous pacemaker, the LC/dPAG-GABA class) and building it means building respiratory rhythm -- a SYSTEM, not a node. NOT load-bearing for Phase C (NRA is driven-only, nothing leaks; the display tracks PAG->NRA->NuAmb-vocal). What is lost is the breath rhythm: FIDELITY, NOT FLOOR. Also unmodelled: the INSPIRATORY PAG route -- 'PAG-induced inspiratory excitation remained even after the [NRA] injections... an additional pathway from the PAG to respiratory motoneurons other than through the NRA' -- so NRA carries the EXPIRATORY/vocal drive only.

PAG-PANIC STILL NEEDS ITS OWN LOCAL GATE -- the item STANDS (v14 Phase B, ruled). preBotC does NOT close it: preBotC gates the PREMOTOR (a traffic rule); the escape source names vocalisation explicitly among the behaviours 'initiated by DISINHIBITION... of local GABAergic circuits WITHIN THE PAG'. TWO MECHANISMS, TWO PLACES, BOTH REAL: PAG-PANIC should have a local tonic gate of its own AND preBotC should gate the NRA premotor. Do not treat either as the other.

dPAG LUMPS DORSOLATERAL + LATERAL -- the next split (v14 Phase B: register, do NOT act). The dl/l dissociation meets the grain test: different afferents, different outputs, different analgesia, and now a DIFFERENT PROJECTION TO NRA -- stimulation of the LATERAL and ventrolateral PAG generates vocalisation while the DORSOLATERAL produces hyperpneic tachypnea and does NOT project to NRA. Our dPAG is seeded 'dorsal PAG / flight' (Bandler's dl) yet carries VMHvl->dPAG for ATTACK, which is the LATERAL column's function -- so it is the dl-l COMPLEX, and dPAG->NRA is grounded via its lateral component only. THE MODEL CANNOT EXPRESS THAT THE DORSOLATERAL HALF DOES NOT PROJECT. NOT NOW: the split would re-open the aggression keystone (VMHvl->attack lands in the lateral column) -- bigger than expression needs. Same class as 'anterior vlPAG'. THE DORSOMEDIAL COLUMN IS UNREPRESENTED ENTIRELY -- register that too. TENSION RECORDED, NOT RESOLVED: a mouse separation-call literature puts the DORSOLATERAL PAG in the vocal route (dlPAG -> neurotensin+ NRA neurons), against the cat/monkey stimulation result -- species/paradigm difference. ▲ NOW LOAD-BEARING (S67): this split is the correction condition for VMH->vlPAG -- VMHdm/c's immobility drive belongs on the dorsolateral column (VMH->dlPAG, inflexible immobility), distinct from vlPAG passive freeze. Promote to the NEXT SUBSTRATE-SHAPE PASS (its own diagnosis, not stacked on a grounding pass). SUB-QUESTIONS: which VMH population (dm vs c); how the dl and l columns differ in afferents/efferents; whether VMHvl->dPAG (strong) ALSO re-points; the two freeze types map to different threat-imminence stages (Fanselow: attentive/dl vs passive/vl).

THE DUAL PATHWAY IS EXPLICIT IN THE VOCAL DOMAIN -- Phase D wires to the MOTONEURONS, not into the PAG limb (v14 Phase B: register, do not build). 'They generate vocalization by activating the PREFRONTAL-PAG-NRA-MOTONEURONAL pathway, and, at the same time, they modulate this vocalization into words and sentences by activating the CORTICO-BULBAR FIBERS to the face, mouth, tongue, larynx and pharynx motoneurons.' TWO ROUTES TO THE SAME MOTONEURONS, stated in one sentence. The volitional route BYPASSES PAG AND NRA ENTIRELY and lands on the motoneuron pools directly -- consistent with NRA's afferent set being CLOSED above the pons (PAG only; 'not from any other suprapontine brain structure'), i.e. NO CORTICAL ROUTE REACHES NRA. So NuAmb-vocal and NuFac are BOTH convergence points, and Phase D's M1-face/PMC-l wire to them, never into the PAG limb.

THE CINGULATE MOTOR SPLIT + THE MISSING AMYGDALO-CINGULATE LINK (v14 Phase B: disclosed, registered, not acted on). The midcingulate contains TWO premotor FACE areas -- M3 (rostral) and M4 (caudal) (Morecraft et al. 2004) -- and Morecraft's cited emotional route is 'from the face-perception system THROUGH THE AMYGDALA to cingulate area M3, and from there, DIRECTLY TO THE FACIAL NUCLEUS', with 'a robust projection... from the lateral basal nucleus of the amygdala to... M3'. TWO GAPS: (1) our `dACC` node is nodes='dorsal ACC / mid-cingulate' but function='Conflict/error monitoring; effort; expected value of control' -- it LUMPS the COGNITIVE anterior cingulate with the MIDCINGULATE MOTOR areas M3/M4, so dACC->NuFac is grounded only via its midcingulate-motor component (same class as the PAG lump); (2) BA->dACC DOES NOT EXIST -- the cited amygdalo-cingulate link is absent, so the model's affective drive to dACC currently arrives via aIns->dACC instead of the cited BA->M3. The emotional route to the face is therefore built but its cited AFFERENT is not.

'UNEFFERENTED' NEEDS A SECOND QUESTION: HUB OR TERMINAL? (v14 Phase B -- corrects the Phase A dead-end table, which was mine.) A TERMINAL node SHOULD be unefferented: the body is not modelled as circuits. PAG was a HUB with no output -- a real gap. SympOut IS the output ('Sympathetic effector: cardiac, vascular, metabolic, adrenal'), like NuAmb-cardiac and DMV (both 0-out), and now like NuAmb-vocal/NuFac (their target is muscle). AdrenalCortex is the exception that PROVES the test -- it has efferents because CORTISOL RE-ENTERS THE BRAIN. THE TEST: does the node's product return to the modelled system? If yes it needs efferents; if no it is terminal and complete. The 'complete SympOut's efferent' item is STRUCK: Gross's suppression cost reads from SympOut's ACTIVATION, exactly as Phase C reads the expression effectors. The effector layer is READ, not traversed.

SCAN MANIPULATION SET vs SIGNATURE SET MUST BE DISJOINT -- becomes live at Phase C (v14: register, do not act; NOT ruled). `motor_effector` is currently excluded from the SCAN as well as from temperament. By the gate-class logic that looks WRONG -- lesioning is an experiment, and kainic acid into NRA is EXACTLY the experiment that proved the relay. But it does not turn on the domain: IT TURNS ON THE SIGNATURE SET. A SEARCH MUST NOT RANGE OVER THE NODES ITS OWN SIGNATURE READS. Once Phase C makes the display a read-out over NuFac/NuAmb-vocal, a scan free to lesion them would be searching for 'what reduces the display' by lesioning the display -- the construct-validity tautology in its purest form. THE RULE TO TEST THEN: a scan's manipulation set and its signature set must be DISJOINT. Joins the throttle-set audit -- same class.

dACC LUMPS THE COGNITIVE ACC WITH THE MIDCINGULATE MOTOR AREAS -- the THIRD split candidate (v14 Phase B, ruled: register, do NOT act; queued BEHIND dPAG's dl/l split). Our dACC is nodes='dorsal ACC / mid-cingulate' but function='Conflict/error monitoring; effort; expected value of control', while the midcingulate contains TWO premotor FACE areas -- M3 (rostral) and M4 (caudal) (Morecraft et al. 2004). It meets the grain test: conflict monitoring and a premotor face area do not develop or behave alike, and they now have DIFFERENT OUTPUTS (dACC->NuFac is carried by M3/M4; dACC->PAG-PANIC by the cingulo-periaqueductal vocalisation pathway; the conflict-monitoring function by neither). Both BA->dACC and dACC->NuFac therefore attribute to the whole node what M3 carries -- disclosed on each edge. M4 specifically 'targets the lateral regions of the facial nucleus, especially the motor neurons that supply the upper lip' (appeasement/smile/ disgust) -- an expression-relevant sub-grain the single node cannot express.

PAG-PANIC = the DORSOMEDIAL column? -- a CROSS-FRAMEWORK identification, inferred and disclosed (v14 Phase B: flag for the audit, precisely because it is tidy). If PAG-PANIC is the dm column then vlPAG (vl) + dPAG (dl+l) + PAG-PANIC (dm) = ALL FOUR of Bandler/Holstege's columns and the scheme is complete -- which is why the earlier 'the dorsomedial column is unrepresented' registration was WITHDRAWN. BUT: PAG-PANIC is a PANKSEPP-era node (nodes='periventricular/periaqueductal separation-distress & vocalisation system') being mapped onto HOLSTEGE's columnar scheme. That is a cross-framework reconciliation: INFERRED, not measured. It may well be right. 'IT COMPLETES THE SCHEME' IS AN AESTHETIC ARGUMENT, NOT EVIDENCE. The PAG-PANIC->NRA band (`moderate`, from Holstege's dm-projects-'to a lesser extent') rests on this identification, and inherits its uncertainty.

S18 -- THE CORTICAL BRAKE LAYER IS INCOMPLETE (3 of 11 braked) (systemic condition, v14 Expression Phase B+, RULED: register as a property of the substrate, NOT a to-do list). Of 11 cortical nodes, dlPFC, vmPFC AND NOW dACC have a local GABAergic feedback interneuron (-GABA partner). EIGHT remain UNBRAKED: dmPFC, vlPFC, OFC, aIns, mIns, pSTS, rSMG-TPJ, PCun-PCC. dACC was built this pass -- because BA->dACC gave it real drive and it saturated; it is the FIRST landmine stepped on, not the last gap closed. THE REMAINING EIGHT ARE THE RESOLUTION CONDITION for the earned negative (test_divergence_does_not_robustly_emerge, xfailed): re-measure the divergence when the layer is complete. THE GENERAL LAW (the implementer's own sentence, ruled the governing principle): 'it only stayed quiet before because its afferents were inert.' Every unbraked cortical node is quiet ONLY for that reason and WILL saturate the moment it is given real drive -- and Phase D (M1-face, PMC-l, the cortico-bulbar limb) + the representational layer above it are about to drive several of them. ★ THE HARDER HALF -- MISSING INHIBITION DOES NOT JUST DESTABILISE, IT MANUFACTURES EFFECT SIZES: an unbraked node saturates; saturation drives the outcome measure into its ceiling; a ceiling looks like a large, clean effect. A substrate with 2-of-11 cortical brakes is BIASED TOWARD PRODUCING LARGE PUBLISHABLE-LOOKING EFFECTS IN THE DIRECTION THE THESIS WANTS. Two confirmed instances: the CU punishment 'signature' (dead LC) and the divergence 'emergence' (unbraked dACC) -- BOTH times the wanted result appeared exactly where a mechanism was incomplete. That is not coincidence; it is the mechanism of the artifact. CONSEQUENCE (audit caveat): every effect SIZE measured on this substrate to date is PROVISIONAL IN ONE DIRECTION -- UPWARD. Not the existence of the effects; their magnitude. Grounding each missing cortical brake can only shrink an effect toward its true size, never invent one. Build each -GABA when its node is given real drive (as dACC-GABA was), grounded rate first, NEVER as a batch and NEVER to move a result. ▲ WIDENED (v14 Phase C, RULED): the caution is NARROWER than the phenomenon. Missing inhibition is only ONE mechanism; the general law is ARTIFACTS INFLATE. THREE instances, THREE mechanisms, ONE direction: the CU punishment signature (a dead HUB), the divergence (an unbraked NODE), and the vicarious magnitude (a fake READ-OUT that read the drive not the output). The reason is STRUCTURAL, not luck: an incomplete mechanism has FEWER CONSTRAINTS -> less attenuation -> bigger numbers. So 'the effect got SMALLER when we made it honest' is the EXPECTED direction for every remaining completion; 'it got BIGGER' would be the surprise and is worth STOPPING for.

S19 -- READ-OUT AUDIT (v14 Expression Phase B+, RULED: now a CLASS, not an instance; queue with the 209-edge / throttle-set audit -- it is the same check from the other side). A read-out set that means the outcome measure must have EVERY term actually carry, or the set's NAME overstates what it measures. Two sets are known to rest on a SUBSET of their terms: (1) DEFENSIVE_OUTPUT = (CeA, vlPAG, BA) computes on 2 OF 3 -- vlPAG reads 0.000 in every condition (its only excitatory afferent, VMH, is itself excitation-unafferented; see S20). Every freezing/defensive-output result to date is provisional in that specific sense. (2) The executive read-out EXECUTIVE = (dlPFC, OFC, dACC): before dACC-GABA the warm>harsh 'engagement' result was carried by OFC ALONE (dlPFC slightly FAVOURED harsh; dACC sat flat/inert). AND it conflates two constructs: dACC is conflict/error MONITORING -- rising under a harsh, unpredictable environment is CORRECT, not a failure of control; the set sums MONITORING with CONTROL as if one quantity. With dACC-GABA in, the engagement test STILL fails, now for this reason not saturation -- so per the ruling the read-out is to be re-expressed to SEPARATE monitoring from control (they are different constructs, not two terms of one). THE CHECK: does every term of a read-out set actually carry, or does the set inherit a name from a term that is inert or that measures a different construct?
